\section{Manual ML Three-step}\label{manual-ml-three-step-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 1 - Class Enumeration w/ Auxiliary Specification}\label{step-1---class-enumeration-w-auxiliary-specification-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

This step is done after class enumeration (or after you have selected the best latent class model). In this example, the four class model was the best. Now, we re-estimate the four-class model using \texttt{optseed} for efficiency. The difference here is the \texttt{SAVEDATA} command, where I can save the posterior probabilities and the modal class assignment that will be used in steps two and three.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{step1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step 1 {-} Three{-}Step using LSAL"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
  \StringTok{"categorical = enjoy useful logical job adult; }
\StringTok{   usevar = enjoy useful logical job adult;}
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   classes = c(4); }
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   auxiliary =  math\_irt  ! distal outcome "}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 0;}
\StringTok{    optseed = 568405;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} 
   \StringTok{"File=savedata\_dis.dat;}
\StringTok{    Save=cprob;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"residual tech11 tech14"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{    series = enjoy{-}adult(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{step1\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step1,}
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Step1.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"one\_dis.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"plot\_lca.R"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{output\_lsay }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"one\_dis.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\FunctionTok{plot\_lca}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{model\_name =}\NormalTok{ output\_lsay)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{14-one-distal_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-8-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 2 - Determine Measurement Error}\label{step-2---determine-measurement-error-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Extract logits for the classification probabilities for the most likely latent class

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{logit\_cprobs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_lsay[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{                                       [[}\StringTok{"logitProbs.mostLikely"}\NormalTok{]])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Extract saved dataset which is part of the mplusObject ``step1\_fit''

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{savedata }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_lsay[[}\StringTok{"savedata"}\NormalTok{]])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Rename the column in savedata named ``C'' and change to ``N''

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata)[}\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata)}\SpecialCharTok{==}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"N"}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 3 - LCA Auxiliary Variable Model with 1 Distal Outcome}\label{step-3---lca-auxiliary-variable-model-with-1-distal-outcome}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{step3  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step3 {-} 3step LSAY"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
 \StringTok{"nominal=N;}
\StringTok{  usevar = n;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  classes = c(4);}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  usevar = math\_irt;"}\NormalTok{ ,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
 \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{  type = mixture; }
\StringTok{  starts = 0;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODEL =}
  \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
 \StringTok{" \%OVERALL\%}
\StringTok{ }

\StringTok{     \%C\#1\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[1,1]\}]; ! MUST EDIT if you do not have a 4{-}class model. }
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m1);    ! conditional distal mean }
\StringTok{  math\_irt;          ! conditional distal variance (freely estimated)}

\StringTok{  \%C\#2\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m2);}
\StringTok{  math\_irt;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%C\#3\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m3);}
\StringTok{  math\_irt;}

\StringTok{  \%C\#4\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[4,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m4);}
\StringTok{  math\_irt; "}\NormalTok{),}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODELCONSTRAINT =} 
   \StringTok{"New (diff12 diff13 diff23 }
\StringTok{    diff14 diff24 diff34);}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{    diff12 = m1{-}m2;  ! test pairwise distal mean differences}
\StringTok{    diff13 = m1{-}m3;}
\StringTok{    diff23 = m2{-}m3;}
\StringTok{    diff14 = m1{-}m4;}
\StringTok{    diff24 = m2{-}m4;}
\StringTok{    diff34 = m3{-}m4;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODELTEST =} \StringTok{"     ! omnibus test of distal means }
\StringTok{    m1=m2;}
\StringTok{    m2=m3;}
\StringTok{    m3=m4;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
 
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata), }
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ savedata)}

\NormalTok{step3\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step3,}
               \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Step3.dat"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three\_dis.inp"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Wald Test Table}\label{wald-test-table}

This is testing if there is a relation between the latent class variable and the distal outcome (mathirt)

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three\_dis.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{wald }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(WaldChiSq\_Value}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{WaldChiSq\_PValue) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{WaldChiSq\_DF =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, WaldChiSq\_DF, }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(wald\_test, WaldChiSq\_Value, WaldChiSq\_DF, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =}\NormalTok{ WaldChiSq\_PValue) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{))))}

\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{wald\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ wald }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Wald Test Distal Means (Math IRT Scores)"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{wald\_test =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Wald Test (*df*)"}\NormalTok{), }
      \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{wald\_table}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large Wald Test Distal Means (Math IRT Scores)}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}cc}
\toprule
Wald Test (\emph{df}) & \emph{p}-value \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
69.108 (3) & <.001* \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{tabular*}
\end{table}

Save figure

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{gtsave}\NormalTok{(wald\_table, }\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"wald\_table.docx"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Table of Pairwise Distal Outcome Differences}\label{table-of-pairwise-distal-outcome-differences}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three\_dis.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{diff }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"DIFF"}\NormalTok{, param)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{pval) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(se,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(estimate, est, se, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_remove}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"DIFF"}\NormalTok{),}
         \AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(param)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{separate}\NormalTok{(param, }\AttributeTok{into =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Group"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{sep =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{class =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class "}\NormalTok{, Group1, }\StringTok{" vs "}\NormalTok{, Group2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(class, estimate, pval) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{))))}

\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{diff }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Distal Outcome Differences"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{class =} \StringTok{"Class"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{estimate =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Mean (*se*)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{sub\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
              \AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large Distal Outcome Differences}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}ccc}
\toprule
Class & Mean (\emph{se}) & \emph{p}-value \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Class 1 vs 2 & 6.731 (0.98) & <.001* \\ 
Class 1 vs 3 & 3.103 (0.96) & 0.001* \\ 
Class 2 vs 3 & -3.628 (1.31) & 0.006* \\ 
Class 1 vs 4 & 7.027 (1.29) & <.001* \\ 
Class 2 vs 4 & 0.296 (1.45) & 0.838 \\ 
Class 3 vs 4 & 3.924 (1.49) & 0.008* \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{tabular*}
\end{table}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Plot Distal Outcome Means}\label{plot-distal-outcome-means}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three\_dis.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract class size }
\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"modelEstimated"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"proportion"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"cs"} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(cs}\SpecialCharTok{*}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{c\_size\_val }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(c\_size), }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:nrow(c\_size),]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}


\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{estimates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(paramHeader }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Means"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, est, se) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(param }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"MATH\_IRT"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(est, se), as.numeric)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{LatentClass =}\NormalTok{ c\_size\_val)}

\CommentTok{\# Add labels (}\AlertTok{NOTE}\CommentTok{: You must change the labels to match the significance testing!!) }
\CommentTok{\#value\_labels \textless{}{-} paste0(estimates$est, c("a"," bc"," abd"," cd"))}

\NormalTok{estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{LatentClass }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fct\_inorder}\NormalTok{(estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{LatentClass)}

\CommentTok{\# Plot bar graphs}
\NormalTok{estimates }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{LatentClass, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ est, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_col}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"dodge"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_errorbar}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin=}\NormalTok{est}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{se, }\AttributeTok{ymax=}\NormalTok{est}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{se),}
                \AttributeTok{linewidth=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,    }\CommentTok{\# Thinner lines}
                \AttributeTok{width=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
                \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_text}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =}\NormalTok{ est), }
            \AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
            \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{),}
            \AttributeTok{vjust =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}  
 \CommentTok{\# scale\_fill\_grey(start = .4, end = .7) + \# Remove for colorful bars}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y=}\StringTok{"Math Scores"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x=}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_cowplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size=}\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{legend.position=}\StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{14-one-distal_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-16-1.pdf}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Save plot}
\FunctionTok{ggsave}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"ManualDistal\_Plot.jpeg"}\NormalTok{),              }
       \AttributeTok{dpi=}\DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width=}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{units=}\StringTok{"in"}\NormalTok{) }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Automated Three-Step}\label{automated-three-step-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\emph{Application: Undergraduate Cheating behavior}

``Dichotomous self-report responses by 319 undergraduates to four questions about cheating behavior'' (poLCA, 2016).

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Prepare data

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\FunctionTok{data}\NormalTok{(cheating)}

\NormalTok{cheating }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cheating }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{clean\_names}\NormalTok{() }

\NormalTok{df\_cheat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{  cheating }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                  
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                  
  \FunctionTok{mutate\_all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{funs}\NormalTok{(.}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{gpa =}\NormalTok{ cheating}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gpa)}

\CommentTok{\# Detaching packages that mask the dpylr functions }
\FunctionTok{detach}\NormalTok{(package}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{poLCA, }\AttributeTok{unload =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{detach}\NormalTok{(package}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{MASS, }\AttributeTok{unload =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{DU3STEP}\label{du3step}

\textbf{DU3STEP} incorporates distal outcome variables (assumed to have unequal means and variances) with mixture models.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{center}\includegraphics{14-one-distal_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-18-1} \end{center}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Run the \textbf{DU3step} model with \texttt{gpa} as distal outcome}{Run the DU3step model with gpa as distal outcome}}\label{run-the-du3step-model-with-gpa-as-distal-outcome}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{m\_stepdu  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"DU3STEP {-} GPA as Distal"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
   \StringTok{"categorical = lieexam{-}copyexam; }
\StringTok{    usevar = lieexam{-}copyexam;}
\StringTok{    auxiliary = gpa (du3step);}
\StringTok{    classes = c(2);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 500 100; }
\StringTok{    processors = 10;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"sampstat patterns tech11 tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{     series = lieexam{-}copyexam(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(df\_cheat),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ df\_cheat)}

\NormalTok{m\_stepdu\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(m\_stepdu, }
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"du3step.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c2\_du3step.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Plot Distal Outcome mean differences}\label{plot-distal-outcome-mean-differences}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c2\_du3step.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract class size }
\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"modelEstimated"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"proportion"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"cs"} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(cs}\SpecialCharTok{*}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{c\_size\_val }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(c\_size), }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:nrow(c\_size),]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}


\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{estimates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"lcCondMeans"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"overall"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  reshape2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{melt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{id.vars =} \StringTok{"var"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variable =} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(variable),}
         \AttributeTok{LatentClass =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
           \FunctionTok{endsWith}\NormalTok{(variable, }\StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ c\_size\_val[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],}
           \FunctionTok{endsWith}\NormalTok{(variable, }\StringTok{"2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ c\_size\_val[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{])) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \CommentTok{\#Add to this based on the number of classes you have}
  \FunctionTok{head}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ value) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mean"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{contains}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"m"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"se"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{contains}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"se"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(mean, se), as.numeric))}

\CommentTok{\# Add labels (}\AlertTok{NOTE}\CommentTok{: You must change the labels to match the significance testing!!) }
\NormalTok{value\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mean, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" a"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{" b"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Plot bar graphs}
\NormalTok{estimates }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"dodge"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_errorbar}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin=}\NormalTok{mean}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{se, }\AttributeTok{ymax=}\NormalTok{mean}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{se),}
                \AttributeTok{size=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,    }
                \AttributeTok{width=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
                \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_text}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{label =}\NormalTok{ value\_labels), }
            \AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
            \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{),}
            \AttributeTok{vjust =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \CommentTok{\#scale\_fill\_grey(start = .5, end = .7) +}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y=}\StringTok{"GPA"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x=}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_cowplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size=}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{legend.position=}\StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{expand =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }
                  \AttributeTok{ylim=}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mean}\SpecialCharTok{*}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{))) }\CommentTok{\# Change ylim based on distal outcome rang}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{14-one-distal_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-20-1.pdf}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]


\CommentTok{\# Save plot}
\FunctionTok{ggsave}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Du3STEP\_plot.jpeg"}\NormalTok{),                }
       \AttributeTok{dpi=}\DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width=}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{units=}\StringTok{"in"}\NormalTok{)  }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\chapter{Manual 3-Step Covariate and Distal}\label{manual-3-step-covariate-and-distal}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\textbf{Data source:}

This example utilizes the public-use dataset, \emph{The Longitudinal Survey of American Youth} (\textbf{LSAY}): \href{https://www.lsay.org/}{See documentation here}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Load packages}\label{load-packages-8}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse) }\CommentTok{\#collection of R packages designed for data science}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here) }\CommentTok{\#helps with filepaths}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor) }\CommentTok{\#clean\_names}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt) }\CommentTok{\# create tables}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot) }\CommentTok{\# a ggplot theme}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(DiagrammeR) }\CommentTok{\# create path diagrams}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue) }\CommentTok{\# allows us to paste expressions into R code}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(data.table) }\CommentTok{\# used for \textasciigrave{}melt()\textasciigrave{} function  }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(poLCA)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(reshape2)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

This example uses Gender and Mother's Education as predictors of latent class membership and Math IRT scores as a distal outcome in a single model.

\begin{center}\includegraphics{15-three-step_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-2-1} \end{center}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Application: Longitudinal Study of American Youth, \textbf{Science Attitudes}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large \textbf{LCA Indicators \& Auxiliary Variables: Math Attitudes Example}} \\ 
{\small ~}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}ll}
\toprule
Name &  Variable Description \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
\multicolumn{2}{l}{} \\[2.5pt] 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
enjoy & I enjoy math. \\ 
useful & Math is useful in everyday problems. \\ 
logical & Math helps a person think logically. \\ 
job & It is important to know math to get a good job. \\ 
adult & I will use math in many ways as an adult. \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
\multicolumn{2}{l}{Auxiliary Variables} \\[2.5pt] 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
female & Self-reported student gender (0=Male, 1=Female). \\ 
math\_irt & Standardized IRT math test score - 12th grade. \\ 
mothed & Level of education:  (1) less than high school, (2) high school diploma, (3) some college, (4) 4-year college, and (5) an advanced degree. \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{tabular*}
\end{table}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

The data can be found in the \texttt{data} folder and is called \texttt{lsay\_subset.csv}.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{lsay\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"data"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lsay\_subset.csv"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{clean\_names}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}   \CommentTok{\# make variable names lowercase}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{female =} \FunctionTok{recode}\NormalTok{(gender, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{1}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{2}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\CommentTok{\# relabel values from 1,2 to 0,1}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Descriptive Statistics}\label{descriptive-statistics-8}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{dframe }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult),}
    \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"Variable"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(Variable) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Count =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(value }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{Total =} \FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Proportion Endorsed}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(Count }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ Total, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(Variable, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Proportion Endorsed}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, Count)}

\FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(dframe) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**LCA Indicator Endorsement**"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\&nbsp;"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{column\_labels.font.weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{row\_group.font.weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Manual ML Three-step}\label{manual-ml-three-step-2}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 1 - Class Enumeration w/ Auxiliary Specification}\label{step-1---class-enumeration-w-auxiliary-specification-2}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

This step is done after class enumeration (or after you have selected the best latent class model). In this example, the four class model was the best. Now, we re-estimate the four-class model using \texttt{optseed} for efficiency. The difference here is the \texttt{SAVEDATA} command, where I can save the posterior probabilities and the modal class assignment that will be used in steps two and three.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{step1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step 1 {-} Three{-}Step using LSAL"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
  \StringTok{"categorical = enjoy useful logical job adult; }
\StringTok{   usevar = enjoy useful logical job adult;}
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   classes = c(4); }
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   auxiliary =   ! list all potential covariates and distals here}
\StringTok{   female  mothed      ! covariate}
\StringTok{   math\_irt;      ! distal math test score in 12th grade "}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 0;}
\StringTok{    optseed = 568405;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} 
   \StringTok{"File=savedata.dat;}
\StringTok{    Save=cprob;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"residual tech11 tech14"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{    series = enjoy{-}adult(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{step1\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step1,}
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Step1.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"one.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"plot\_lca.R"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{output\_lsay }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"one.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\FunctionTok{plot\_lca}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{model\_name =}\NormalTok{ output\_lsay)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{15-three-step_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-10-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 2 - Determine Measurement Error}\label{step-2---determine-measurement-error-2}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Extract logits for the classification probabilities for the most likely latent class

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{logit\_cprobs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_lsay[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{                                       [[}\StringTok{"logitProbs.mostLikely"}\NormalTok{]])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Extract saved dataset which is part of the mplusObject ``step1\_fit''

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{savedata }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_lsay[[}\StringTok{"savedata"}\NormalTok{]])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Rename the column in savedata named ``C'' and change to ``N''

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata)[}\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata)}\SpecialCharTok{==}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"N"}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 3 - LCA Auxiliary Variable Model with 2 covariates and 1 distal outcome}\label{step-3---lca-auxiliary-variable-model-with-2-covariates-and-1-distal-outcome}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Model with 2 covariates (gender and mother's education) and 1 distal outcome (math IRT scores)

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{step3  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step3 {-} 3step LSAY"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
 \StringTok{"nominal=N;}
\StringTok{  usevar = n;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  classes = c(4);}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  usevar = female mothed math\_irt;"}\NormalTok{ ,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
 \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{  type = mixture; }
\StringTok{  starts = 0;"}\NormalTok{,}
 
  \AttributeTok{DEFINE =} 
   \StringTok{"center female mothed (grandmean);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODEL =}
  \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
 \StringTok{" \%OVERALL\%}
\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{  math\_irt on female mothed; ! covariate as a related to the distal outcome}
\StringTok{  C on female (f1{-}f3);}
\StringTok{  c on mothed (e1{-}e3);      ! covariate as predictor of C}

\StringTok{     \%C\#1\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[1,1]\}]; ! MUST EDIT if you do not have a 4{-}class model. }
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m1);    ! conditional distal mean }
\StringTok{  math\_irt;          ! conditional distal variance (freely estimated)}

\StringTok{  \%C\#2\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m2);}
\StringTok{  math\_irt;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%C\#3\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m3);}
\StringTok{  math\_irt;}

\StringTok{  \%C\#4\%}
\StringTok{  [n\#1@\{logit\_cprobs[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#2@\{logit\_cprobs[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [n\#3@\{logit\_cprobs[4,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  [math\_irt](m4);}
\StringTok{  math\_irt; "}\NormalTok{),}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODELCONSTRAINT =} 
   \StringTok{"New (diff12 diff13 diff23 }
\StringTok{    diff14 diff24 diff34}
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{    d\_fem\_12 d\_fem\_13 }
\StringTok{    d\_fem\_23}
\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{    d\_ed\_12 d\_ed\_13 }
\StringTok{    d\_ed\_23 }
\StringTok{    );}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{    diff12 = m1{-}m2;  ! test pairwise distal mean differences}
\StringTok{    diff13 = m1{-}m3;}
\StringTok{    diff23 = m2{-}m3;}
\StringTok{    diff14 = m1{-}m4;}
\StringTok{    diff24 = m2{-}m4;}
\StringTok{    diff34 = m3{-}m4;}
\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{    d\_fem\_12 = f1{-}f2;}
\StringTok{    d\_fem\_13 = f1{-}f3;}
\StringTok{    d\_fem\_23 = f2{-}f3; }

\StringTok{    d\_ed\_12 = e1{-}e2;}
\StringTok{    d\_ed\_13 = e1{-}e3;}
\StringTok{    d\_ed\_23 = e2{-}e3; }

\StringTok{ "}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODELTEST =} \StringTok{"     ! omnibus test of distal means }
\StringTok{  !  m1=m2;}
\StringTok{  !  m2=m3;}
\StringTok{  !  m3=m4;}
\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{  ! f1=f2;       ! omnibus test of covariate logits (female)  }
\StringTok{  !  f1=f3;}
\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{    e1=e2;       ! omnibus test of covariate logits (mothers ed)  }
\StringTok{    e1=e3;}
\StringTok{   "}\NormalTok{,}
 
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata), }
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ savedata)}

\NormalTok{step3\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step3,}
               \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Step3.dat"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three.inp"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Wald Test Table}\label{wald-test-table-1}

This is testing if there is a relation between the latent class variable and the distal outcome (mathirt)

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{wald }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(WaldChiSq\_Value}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{WaldChiSq\_PValue) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{WaldChiSq\_DF =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, WaldChiSq\_DF, }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(wald\_test, WaldChiSq\_Value, WaldChiSq\_DF, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =}\NormalTok{ WaldChiSq\_PValue) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{))))}

\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{wald\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ wald }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Wald Test Distal Means (Math IRT Scores)"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{wald\_test =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Wald Test (*df*)"}\NormalTok{), }
      \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{wald\_table}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large Wald Test Distal Means (Math IRT Scores)}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}cc}
\toprule
Wald Test (\emph{df}) & \emph{p}-value \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
2.475 (2) & 0.290 \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{tabular*}
\end{table}

Save figure

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{gtsave}\NormalTok{(wald\_table, }\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"wald\_table.docx"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Table of Pairwise Distal Outcome Differences}\label{table-of-pairwise-distal-outcome-differences-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{diff }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"DIFF"}\NormalTok{, param)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{pval) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(se,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(estimate, est, se, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_remove}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"DIFF"}\NormalTok{),}
         \AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(param)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{separate}\NormalTok{(param, }\AttributeTok{into =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Group"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{sep =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{class =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class "}\NormalTok{, Group1, }\StringTok{" vs "}\NormalTok{, Group2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(class, estimate, pval) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{))))}

\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{diff }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Distal Outcome Differences"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{class =} \StringTok{"Class"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{estimate =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Mean (*se*)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{sub\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
              \AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large Distal Outcome Differences}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}ccc}
\toprule
Class & Mean (\emph{se}) & \emph{p}-value \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Class 1 vs 2 & 6.471 (0.95) & <.001* \\ 
Class 1 vs 3 & 3.016 (0.96) & 0.002* \\ 
Class 2 vs 3 & -3.455 (1.31) & 0.008* \\ 
Class 1 vs 4 & 5.982 (1.24) & <.001* \\ 
Class 2 vs 4 & -0.489 (1.39) & 0.725 \\ 
Class 3 vs 4 & 2.966 (1.46) & 0.042* \\

\end{tabular*}
\end{table}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Plot Distal Outcome Means}\label{plot-distal-outcome-means-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract class size }
\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"modelEstimated"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"proportion"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"cs"} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(cs}\SpecialCharTok{*}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{c\_size\_val }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(c\_size), }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:nrow(c\_size),]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}


\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{estimates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(paramHeader }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Intercepts"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, est, se) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(param }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"MATH\_IRT"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(est, se), as.numeric)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{LatentClass =}\NormalTok{ c\_size\_val)}

\CommentTok{\# Add labels (}\AlertTok{NOTE}\CommentTok{: You must change the labels to match the significance testing!!) }
\CommentTok{\#value\_labels \textless{}{-} paste0(estimates$est, c("a"," bc"," abd"," cd"))}

\NormalTok{estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{LatentClass }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fct\_inorder}\NormalTok{(estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{LatentClass)}

\CommentTok{\# Plot bar graphs}
\NormalTok{estimates }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{LatentClass, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ est, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_col}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"dodge"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_errorbar}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin=}\NormalTok{est}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{se, }\AttributeTok{ymax=}\NormalTok{est}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{se),}
                \AttributeTok{size=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,    }\CommentTok{\# Thinner lines}
                \AttributeTok{width=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
                \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_text}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =}\NormalTok{ est), }
            \AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
            \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{),}
            \AttributeTok{vjust =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}  
 \CommentTok{\# scale\_fill\_grey(start = .4, end = .7) + \# Remove for colorful bars}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y=}\StringTok{"Math Scores"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x=}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_cowplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size=}\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{legend.position=}\StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{15-three-step_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-18-1.pdf}}

\CommentTok{\# Save plot}
\FunctionTok{ggsave}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"ManualDistal\_Plot.jpeg"}\NormalTok{),              }
       \AttributeTok{dpi=}\DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width=}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{units=}\StringTok{"in"}\NormalTok{) }

\subsubsection{Covariates Relations}\label{covariates-relations-1}

As of 1/1/2026, this code is outdated. See here: \url{https://github.com/michaelhallquist/MplusAutomation/issues/228}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{cov }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
   \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\StringTok{"\^{}C\#}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.ON$"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Gender"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \CommentTok{\# Change this to your own covariates}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"MOTHED"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Mother\textquotesingle{}s Education"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{est =} \FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(est, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{),}
         \AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(se, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{),}
         \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(pval, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{latent\_class =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\StringTok{"\^{}C\#(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+)}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.ON$"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Class }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{1"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, est, se, pval, latent\_class) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(se,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(logit, est, se, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, logit, pval, latent\_class) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{)))) }

\NormalTok{or }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"odds"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\StringTok{"\^{}C\#}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.ON$"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Gender"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \CommentTok{\# Change this to your own covariates}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"MOTHED"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Mother\textquotesingle{}s Education"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{est =} \FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(est, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{latent\_class =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\StringTok{"\^{}C\#(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+)}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.ON$"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Class }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{1"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{CI =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"["}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(lower\_2}\FloatTok{.5}\NormalTok{ci, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(upper\_2}\FloatTok{.5}\NormalTok{ci, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"]"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, est, CI, latent\_class) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{or =}\NormalTok{ est)}
  
\NormalTok{combined }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ or }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{full\_join}\NormalTok{(cov) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, latent\_class, logit, pval, or, CI)}


\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{combined }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{groupname\_col =} \StringTok{"latent\_class"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{rowname\_col =} \StringTok{"param"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Predictors of Class Membership"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{logit =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Logit (*se*)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{or =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Odds Ratio"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{CI =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"95\% CI"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{sub\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
              \AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{sub\_values}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"999.000"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{replacement =} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}   
  \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{footnote =} \StringTok{"Reference Class: 4"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{groups =} \StringTok{"title"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Distal outcome regressed on the covariate}\label{distal-outcome-regressed-on-the-covariate}

Is there a relation between the distal outcome (Math IRT Scores) and the covariate (Gender)?

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"manual\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"three.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{donx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(param }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"MOTHED"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Gender"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{str\_replace}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"MOTHED"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Mother\textquotesingle{}s Education"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{LatentClass =} \FunctionTok{sub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Class "}\NormalTok{, LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}  
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{paramHeader) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(se,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(estimate, est, se, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(param, estimate, pval) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{distinct}\NormalTok{(param, }\AttributeTok{.keep\_all=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{))))}


\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{donx }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{groupname\_col =} \StringTok{"LatentClass"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{rowname\_col =} \StringTok{"param"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Gender Predicting Math Scores"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{estimate =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Estimate (*se*)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{sub\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
              \AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{sub\_values}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"999.000"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{replacement =} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large Gender Predicting Math Scores}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}l|cc}
\toprule
 & Estimate (\emph{se}) & \emph{p}-value \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Gender & -1.527 (0.53) & 0.004* \\ 
Mother's Education & 3.589 (0.27) & <.001* \\
