\end{table}

\chapter{Automatic 3-Step Covariate Only}\label{automatic-3-step-covariate-only}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\textbf{Data source:}

This utilizes a dataset on undergraduate \emph{Cheating} available from the \texttt{poLCA} package (Dayton, 1998): \href{https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/poLCA/poLCA.pdf}{See documentation here}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Load packages}\label{load-packages-9}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse) }\CommentTok{\#collection of R packages designed for data science}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here) }\CommentTok{\#helps with filepaths}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor) }\CommentTok{\#clean\_names}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt) }\CommentTok{\# create tables}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot) }\CommentTok{\# a ggplot theme}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(DiagrammeR) }\CommentTok{\# create path diagrams}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue) }\CommentTok{\# allows us to paste expressions into R code}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(data.table) }\CommentTok{\# used for \textasciigrave{}melt()\textasciigrave{} function  }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(poLCA)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(reshape2)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Automated Three-Step}\label{automated-three-step-2}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\emph{Application: Undergraduate Cheating behavior}

``Dichotomous self-report responses by 319 undergraduates to four questions about cheating behavior'' (poLCA, 2016).

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Prepare data

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\FunctionTok{data}\NormalTok{(cheating)}

\NormalTok{cheating }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cheating }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{clean\_names}\NormalTok{() }

\NormalTok{df\_cheat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{  cheating }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                  
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                  
  \FunctionTok{mutate\_all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{funs}\NormalTok{(.}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{gpa =}\NormalTok{ cheating}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gpa)}

\CommentTok{\# Detaching packages that mask the dpylr functions }
\FunctionTok{detach}\NormalTok{(package}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{poLCA, }\AttributeTok{unload =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{detach}\NormalTok{(package}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{MASS, }\AttributeTok{unload =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{R3STEP}\label{r3step-1}

\textbf{R3STEP} incorporates latent class predictors with mixture models. However, it is recommended to use the manual three-step.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{center}\includegraphics{18-one-covariate-auto_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-3-1} \end{center}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Run the \textbf{R3STEP} model with \texttt{gpa} as the latent class predictor}{Run the R3STEP model with gpa as the latent class predictor}}\label{run-the-r3step-model-with-gpa-as-the-latent-class-predictor-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{m\_stepr  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"R3STEP {-} GPA as Predictor"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
   \StringTok{"categorical = lieexam{-}copyexam; }
\StringTok{    usevar = lieexam{-}copyexam;}
\StringTok{    auxiliary = gpa (R3STEP);}
\StringTok{    classes = c(2);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 500 100; }
\StringTok{    processors = 10;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"sampstat patterns tech11 tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{     series = lieexam{-}copyexam(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(df\_cheat),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ df\_cheat)}

\NormalTok{m\_stepr\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(m\_stepr, }
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"r3step.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c2\_r3step.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Regression slopes and odds ratios}\label{regression-slopes-and-odds-ratios-1}

\begin{verbatim}
TESTS OF CATEGORICAL LATENT VARIABLE MULTINOMIAL LOGISTIC REGRESSIONS USING
THE 3-STEP PROCEDURE

   WARNING:  LISTWISE DELETION IS APPLIED TO THE AUXILIARY VARIABLES IN THE
   ANALYSIS.  TO AVOID LISTWISE DELETION, DATA IMPUTATION CAN BE USED
   FOR THE AUXILIARY VARIABLES FOLLOWED BY ANALYSIS WITH TYPE=IMPUTATION.
   NUMBER OF DELETED OBSERVATIONS:  4
   NUMBER OF OBSERVATIONS USED:  315

                                                    Two-Tailed
                    Estimate       S.E.  Est./S.E.    P-Value

 C#1        ON
    GPA               -0.698      0.255     -2.739      0.006

 Intercepts
    C#1               -0.241      0.460     -0.523      0.601

Parameterization using Reference Class 1

 C#2        ON
    GPA                0.698      0.255      2.739      0.006

 Intercepts
    C#2                0.241      0.460      0.523      0.601


ODDS RATIOS FOR TESTS OF CATEGORICAL LATENT VARIABLE MULTINOMIAL LOGISTIC REGRESSIONS
USING THE 3-STEP PROCEDURE

                                                95% C.I.
                    Estimate       S.E. Lower 2.5% Upper 2.5%

 C#1        ON
    GPA                0.498      0.127      0.302      0.820


Parameterization using Reference Class 1

 C#2        ON
    GPA                2.009      0.512      1.220      3.310
\end{verbatim}

\chapter{Automatic 3-Step Distal Only}\label{automatic-3-step-distal-only}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\textbf{Data source:}

This utilizes a dataset on undergraduate \emph{Cheating} available from the \texttt{poLCA} package (Dayton, 1998): \href{https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/poLCA/poLCA.pdf}{See documentation here}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Load packages}\label{load-packages-10}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse) }\CommentTok{\#collection of R packages designed for data science}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here) }\CommentTok{\#helps with filepaths}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor) }\CommentTok{\#clean\_names}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt) }\CommentTok{\# create tables}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot) }\CommentTok{\# a ggplot theme}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(DiagrammeR) }\CommentTok{\# create path diagrams}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue) }\CommentTok{\# allows us to paste expressions into R code}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(data.table) }\CommentTok{\# used for \textasciigrave{}melt()\textasciigrave{} function  }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(poLCA)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(reshape2)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Automated Three-Step}\label{automated-three-step-3}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\emph{Application: Undergraduate Cheating behavior}

``Dichotomous self-report responses by 319 undergraduates to four questions about cheating behavior'' (poLCA, 2016).

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Prepare data

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\FunctionTok{data}\NormalTok{(cheating)}

\NormalTok{cheating }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cheating }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{clean\_names}\NormalTok{() }

\NormalTok{df\_cheat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{  cheating }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                  
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                  
  \FunctionTok{mutate\_all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{funs}\NormalTok{(.}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                                
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{gpa =}\NormalTok{ cheating}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gpa)}

\CommentTok{\# Detaching packages that mask the dpylr functions }
\FunctionTok{detach}\NormalTok{(package}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{poLCA, }\AttributeTok{unload =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{detach}\NormalTok{(package}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{MASS, }\AttributeTok{unload =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{DU3STEP}\label{du3step-1}

\textbf{DU3STEP} incorporates distal outcome variables (assumed to have unequal means and variances) with mixture models.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{center}\includegraphics{19-one-distal-auto_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-3-1} \end{center}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Run the \textbf{DU3step} model with \texttt{gpa} as distal outcome}{Run the DU3step model with gpa as distal outcome}}\label{run-the-du3step-model-with-gpa-as-distal-outcome-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{m\_stepdu  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"DU3STEP {-} GPA as Distal"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
   \StringTok{"categorical = lieexam{-}copyexam; }
\StringTok{    usevar = lieexam{-}copyexam;}
\StringTok{    auxiliary = gpa (du3step);}
\StringTok{    classes = c(2);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 500 100; }
\StringTok{    processors = 10;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"sampstat patterns tech11 tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{     series = lieexam{-}copyexam(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(df\_cheat),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ df\_cheat)}

\NormalTok{m\_stepdu\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(m\_stepdu, }
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"du3step.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c2\_du3step.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{Plot Distal Outcome mean differences}\label{plot-distal-outcome-mean-differences-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{modelParams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"three\_step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"auto\_3step"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c2\_du3step.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Extract class size }
\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"modelEstimated"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"proportion"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"cs"} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(cs}\SpecialCharTok{*}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{c\_size\_val }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(c\_size), }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:nrow(c\_size),]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}


\CommentTok{\# Extract information as data frame}
\NormalTok{estimates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(modelParams[[}\StringTok{"lcCondMeans"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"overall"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  reshape2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{melt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{id.vars =} \StringTok{"var"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{variable =} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(variable),}
         \AttributeTok{LatentClass =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
           \FunctionTok{endsWith}\NormalTok{(variable, }\StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ c\_size\_val[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],}
           \FunctionTok{endsWith}\NormalTok{(variable, }\StringTok{"2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ c\_size\_val[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{])) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \CommentTok{\#Add to this based on the number of classes you have}
  \FunctionTok{head}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ value) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mean"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{contains}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"m"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"se"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{contains}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"se"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(mean, se), as.numeric))}

\CommentTok{\# Add labels (}\AlertTok{NOTE}\CommentTok{: You must change the labels to match the significance testing!!) }
\NormalTok{value\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mean, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" a"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{" b"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Plot bar graphs}
\NormalTok{estimates }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"dodge"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{stat =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_errorbar}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin=}\NormalTok{mean}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{se, }\AttributeTok{ymax=}\NormalTok{mean}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{se),}
                \AttributeTok{size=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,    }
                \AttributeTok{width=}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
                \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_text}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ mean, }\AttributeTok{label =}\NormalTok{ value\_labels), }
            \AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
            \AttributeTok{position=}\FunctionTok{position\_dodge}\NormalTok{(.}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{),}
            \AttributeTok{vjust =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \CommentTok{\#scale\_fill\_grey(start = .5, end = .7) +}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y=}\StringTok{"GPA"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x=}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_cowplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size=}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{legend.position=}\StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{expand =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }
                  \AttributeTok{ylim=}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(estimates}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mean}\SpecialCharTok{*}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{))) }\CommentTok{\# Change ylim based on distal outcome rang}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{19-one-distal-auto_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-5-1.pdf}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]


\CommentTok{\# Save plot}
\FunctionTok{ggsave}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Du3STEP\_plot.jpeg"}\NormalTok{),                }
       \AttributeTok{dpi=}\DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width=}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{units=}\StringTok{"in"}\NormalTok{)  }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\part{Latent Transition Analysis}\label{part-latent-transition-analysis}

\chapter{Enumeration}\label{lta}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\textbf{Data Source}: The data used to illustrate these analyses include elementary school student \emph{Science Attitude} survey items collected during 7th and 10th grades from the \textbf{Longitudinal Study of American Youth} (LSAY; Miller, 2015).

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

To install package \{\texttt{rhdf5}\}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BiocManager"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) }
  \FunctionTok{install.packages}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BiocManager"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\#BiocManager::install("rhdf5")}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\emph{Load packages}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(rhdf5)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)       }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt) }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(reshape2)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(ggrepel)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(haven)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(modelsummary)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(corrplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(DiagrammeR)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(filesstrings)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(PNWColors)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read in LSAY data file, \texttt{lsay\_new.csv}.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lsay\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"data"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lsay\_lta.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"9999"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), as.numeric))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{20-lta_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-4-1.pdf}}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

 \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(female, minority, ab39m}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{ga33l)}

\section{Enumeration}\label{enumeration-4}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Enumerate Time Point 1 (7th grade)}\label{enumerate-time-point-1-7th-grade}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# }\AlertTok{NOTE}\CommentTok{ CHANGE: \textquotesingle{}1:6\textquotesingle{} indicates the number of k{-}class models to estimate}
\CommentTok{\# User can change this number to fit research context}
\CommentTok{\# In this example, the code loops or iterates over values 1 through 6 ( \textquotesingle{}\{k\}\textquotesingle{} )}
\CommentTok{\#}
\NormalTok{t1\_enum\_k\_16  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(k) \{ }
\NormalTok{  enum\_t1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(                 }
    
\CommentTok{\# The \textquotesingle{}glue\textquotesingle{} function inserts R code within a string or "quoted green text" using the syntax \{{-}{-}{-}\}}
\CommentTok{\#}
    \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class{-}\{k\}\_Time1"}\NormalTok{), }
  
    \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{( }
    \StringTok{"!!! NOTE CHANGE: List of the five 7th grade science attitude indicators !!!}
\StringTok{     categorical = ab39m{-}ab39x; }
\StringTok{          usevar = ab39m{-}ab39x;}
\StringTok{     }
\StringTok{     classes = c(\{k\});"}\NormalTok{),}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    !!! NOTE CHANGE: The intial and final start values. Reduce to speed up estimation time. !!!}
\StringTok{    starts = 500 100;           }
\StringTok{    processors=10;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"sampstat residual tech11 tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{    series = ab39m{-}ab39x(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\CommentTok{\# }\AlertTok{NOTE}\CommentTok{ CHANGE: Fix to match appropriate sub{-}folder name}
\CommentTok{\# See after \textasciigrave{}here\textasciigrave{} function (e.g., "enum\_LCA\_time1")}
\NormalTok{enum\_t1\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(enum\_t1,}
                 \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum\_t1"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"t1.dat"}\NormalTok{), }
                 \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum\_t1"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"c\{k\}\_lca\_enum\_time1.inp"}\NormalTok{)),}
                 \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\})}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\textbf{NEXT STEP} Check the output (\texttt{.out}) files to check for convergence warnings or syntax errors.

\subsection{Create Model Fit Summary Table}\label{create-model-fit-summary-table}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read all models for enumeration table

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{output\_enum\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum\_t1"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{output\_enum\_t2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum\_t2"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Extract model fit data

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{enum\_extract1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{LatexSummaryTable}\NormalTok{(output\_enum\_t1,                                 }
                \AttributeTok{keepCols=}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Title"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"BIC"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"aBIC"}\NormalTok{,}
                           \StringTok{"BLRT\_PValue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"T11\_VLMR\_PValue"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Observations"}\NormalTok{))   }

\NormalTok{enum\_extract2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{LatexSummaryTable}\NormalTok{(output\_enum\_t2,                                 }
                \AttributeTok{keepCols=}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Title"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"BIC"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"aBIC"}\NormalTok{,}
                           \StringTok{"BLRT\_PValue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"T11\_VLMR\_PValue"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Observations"}\NormalTok{)) }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Calculate Indices Derived from the Log Likelihood (LL)}\label{calculate-indices-derived-from-the-log-likelihood-ll}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
                           
\NormalTok{allFit1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ enum\_extract1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aBIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{LL}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{Parameters}\SpecialCharTok{*}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{((Observations}\SpecialCharTok{+}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\DecValTok{24}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{CAIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{LL}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{Parameters}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(Observations)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{AWE =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{LL}\SpecialCharTok{+}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{Parameters}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(Observations)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{SIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{5}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{BIC) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{expSIC =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(SIC }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(SIC))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{BF =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(SIC}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(SIC))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cmPk =}\NormalTok{ expSIC}\SpecialCharTok{/}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(expSIC)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{9}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{6}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{13}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(Parameters)}

\NormalTok{allFit2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ enum\_extract2 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aBIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{LL}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{Parameters}\SpecialCharTok{*}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{((Observations}\SpecialCharTok{+}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\DecValTok{24}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{CAIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{LL}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{Parameters}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(Observations)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{AWE =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{LL}\SpecialCharTok{+}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{Parameters}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(Observations)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{SIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{.}\DecValTok{5}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{BIC) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{expSIC =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(SIC }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(SIC))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{BF =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(SIC}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(SIC))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cmPk =}\NormalTok{ expSIC}\SpecialCharTok{/}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(expSIC)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{9}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{6}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{13}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(Parameters)}

\NormalTok{allFit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{full\_join}\NormalTok{(allFit1,allFit2)}

\section{Format Fit Table}\label{format-fit-table}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{rows\_m1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{6}
\NormalTok{rows\_m2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{7}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{12}


\NormalTok{allFit }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Title =} \FunctionTok{str\_remove}\NormalTok{(Title, }\StringTok{"\_Time*"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Model Fit Summary Table**"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Title =} \StringTok{"Classes"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{Parameters =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Par"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{LL =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*LL*"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{T11\_VLMR\_PValue =} \StringTok{"VLMR"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{BLRT\_PValue =} \StringTok{"BLRT"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{BF =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BF"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{cmPk =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*cmP\_k*"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{footnote =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"*Note.* Par = Parameters; *LL* = model log likelihood;}
\StringTok{      BIC = Bayesian information criterion;}
\StringTok{      aBIC = sample size adjusted BIC; CAIC = consistent Akaike information criterion;}
\StringTok{      AWE = approximate weight of evidence criterion;}
\StringTok{      BLRT = bootstrapped likelihood ratio test p{-}value;}
\StringTok{      VLMR = Vuong{-}Lo{-}Mendell{-}Rubin adjusted likelihood ratio test p{-}value;}
\StringTok{      cmPk = approximate correct model probability."}\NormalTok{), }
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{column\_labels.font.weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
             \AttributeTok{drop\_trailing\_zeros=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
             \AttributeTok{suffixing =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{3}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{), }
             \AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{,}
              \AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{"{-}{-}"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{8}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{fns =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(x}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textless{}.001"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{           scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fns =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(x}\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textgreater{}100"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{           scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_row\_group}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"Time{-}1"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{rows =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_row\_group}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"Time{-}2"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{rows =} \DecValTok{7}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{row\_group\_order}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{groups =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Time{-}1"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Time{-}2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
   \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      ),}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ BIC,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ BIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(BIC[rows\_m1]) }\CommentTok{\# Model 1}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ aBIC,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ aBIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(aBIC[rows\_m1])}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ CAIC,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ CAIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(CAIC[rows\_m1])}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ AWE,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ AWE }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(AWE[rows\_m1])}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ cmPk,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{  cmPk }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(cmPk[rows\_m1])}
\NormalTok{     ),   }
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ BIC,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ BIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(BIC[rows\_m2]) }\CommentTok{\# Model 2}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ aBIC,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ aBIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(aBIC[rows\_m2])}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ CAIC,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ CAIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(CAIC[rows\_m2])}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ AWE,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{ AWE }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(AWE[rows\_m2])}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ cmPk,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{  cmPk }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(cmPk[rows\_m2])}
\NormalTok{     ),  }
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ BF, }
     \AttributeTok{row =}\NormalTok{  BF }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{  BLRT\_PValue,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}  \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(BLRT\_PValue }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(BLRT\_PValue) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05}\NormalTok{, BLRT\_PValue }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05}\NormalTok{, }\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{)),}
    \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
     \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{  T11\_VLMR\_PValue,}
     \AttributeTok{row =}  \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(T11\_VLMR\_PValue }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(T11\_VLMR\_PValue) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05}\NormalTok{, T11\_VLMR\_PValue }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05}\NormalTok{, }\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Compare Time 1 \& Time 2 LCA Plots}\label{compare-time-1-time-2-lca-plots}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read models for plotting (4-class models)

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{model\_t1\_c4 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ output\_enum\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{c4\_lca\_enum\_time1.out}
\NormalTok{model\_t2\_c4 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ output\_enum\_t2}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{c4\_lca\_enum\_time2.out}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{\texorpdfstring{Create a function \texttt{plot\_lca\_function} that requires 5 arguments:}{Create a function plot\_lca\_function that requires 5 arguments:}}\label{create-a-function-plot_lca_function-that-requires-5-arguments}

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \texttt{model\_name}: name of Mplus model object (e.g., \texttt{model\_t1\_c4})
\item
  \texttt{item\_num}: the number of items in LCA measurement model (e.g., \texttt{5})
\item
  \texttt{class\_num}: the number of classes (\emph{k}) in LCA model (e.g., \texttt{4})
\item
  \texttt{item\_labels}: the item labels for x-axis (e.g., \texttt{c("Enjoy","Useful","Logical","Job","Adult")})
\item
  \texttt{plot\_title}: include the title of the plot here (e.g., \texttt{"Time\ 1\ LCA\ Conditional\ Item\ Probability\ Plot"})
\end{itemize}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{plot\_lca\_function }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(model\_name,item\_num,class\_num,item\_labels,plot\_title)\{}

\NormalTok{mplus\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(model\_name}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gh5}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{means\_and\_variances\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{estimated\_probs}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{values)}
\NormalTok{plot\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mplus\_model[}\FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{item\_num, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{),]}

\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(model\_name}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{modelEstimated}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{proportion)}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(c\_size) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"cs"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ c\_size }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(cs}\SpecialCharTok{*}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{class\_num, }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:class\_num,]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{plot\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cbind}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Var =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"U"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{item\_num), plot\_t1)}
\NormalTok{plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var,}
               \AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ item\_labels)}
\NormalTok{plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fct\_inorder}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var)}
\NormalTok{pd\_long\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{melt}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1, }\AttributeTok{id.vars =} \StringTok{"Var"}\NormalTok{) }

\NormalTok{p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pd\_long\_t1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(Var), }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ value,}
  \AttributeTok{shape =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{colour =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{lty =}\NormalTok{ variable)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{scale\_x\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{breaks =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var) }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{scale\_colour\_grey}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ plot\_title, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Probability"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_cowplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.title =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{(), }
        \AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"top"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p}
\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(p)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Estimate Latent Transition Analysis (LTA) Model}\label{estimate-latent-transition-analysis-lta-model}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Estimate Invariant LTA Model}\label{estimate-invariant-lta-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lta\_inv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} 
    \StringTok{"Invariant LTA"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
     \StringTok{"usev = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x  ! 7th grade indicators}
\StringTok{             ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l; ! 10th grade indicators}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      categorical = ab39m{-}ab39x ga33a{-}ga33l;}

\StringTok{      classes = c1(4) c2(4);"}\NormalTok{,}
    
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
     \StringTok{"estimator = mlr;}
\StringTok{      type = mixture;}
\StringTok{      starts = 500 100;}
\StringTok{      processors=10;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} 
     \StringTok{"\%overall\%}
\StringTok{      c2 on c1;}

\StringTok{      MODEL c1: }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (1{-}5);  !!! labels that are repeated will constrain parameters to equality !!!}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (6{-}10);}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (11{-}15);}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (16{-}20);}

\StringTok{      MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (1{-}5);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (6{-}10);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (11{-}15);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (16{-}20);"}\NormalTok{,}
   
  \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} 
   \StringTok{"file = LTA\_Inv\_CPROBS.dat;}
\StringTok{    save = cprob;}
\StringTok{    missflag = 9999;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"tech1 tech15 svalues;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{lta\_inv\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(lta\_inv,}
                 \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                 \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"4{-}class{-}invariant.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
                 \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Estimate Non-Invariant Estimated LTA Model}\label{estimate-non-invariant-estimated-lta-model}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lta\_non\_inv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} 
    \StringTok{"Non{-}Invariant LTA"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
     \StringTok{"usev = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x  ! 7th grade indicators}
\StringTok{             ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l; ! 10th grade indicators}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      categorical = ab39m{-}ab39x ga33a{-}ga33l;}

\StringTok{      classes = c1(4) c2(4);"}\NormalTok{,}
    
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
     \StringTok{"estimator = mlr;}
\StringTok{      type = mixture;}
\StringTok{      starts = 500 100;}
\StringTok{      processors=10;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} 
     \StringTok{"\%overall\%}
\StringTok{      c2 on c1; !!! estimate all multinomial logistic regressions !!!}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      !!! The above syntax can also be written as: !!!}
\StringTok{               ! c2\#1 on c1\#1 c1\#2 c1\#3; !  }
\StringTok{               ! c2\#2 on c1\#1 c1\#2 c1\#3; !}
\StringTok{               ! c2\#3 on c1\#1 c1\#2 c1\#3; !}

\StringTok{      MODEL c1: !!! the following syntax will allow item thresholds to be estimated for each class (e.g. noninvariance) !!!}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1]; }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1];}

\StringTok{      MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"tech1 tech15 svalues;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{lta\_non\_inv\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(lta\_non\_inv,}
                     \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"4{-}class{-}non{-}invariant.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Conduct Sattorra-Bentler adjusted Log Likelihood Ratio Difference Testing}\label{conduct-sattorra-bentler-adjusted-log-likelihood-ratio-difference-testing}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  non-invariant (comparison): This model has \textbf{more} parameters.
\item
  invariant (nested): This model has \textbf{less} parameters.
\end{itemize}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# *0 = null or nested model \& *1 = comparison  or parent model}

\NormalTok{lta\_models }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Log Likelihood Values}
\NormalTok{L0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{L1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.non.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{]] }

\CommentTok{\# LRT equation}
\NormalTok{lr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{(L0}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{L1) }

\CommentTok{\# Parameters}
\NormalTok{p0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{]] }
\NormalTok{p1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.non.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{]]}

\CommentTok{\# Scaling Correction Factors}
\NormalTok{c0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LLCorrectionFactor"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{c1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.non.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LLCorrectionFactor"}\NormalTok{]]}

\CommentTok{\# Difference Test Scaling correction}
\NormalTok{cd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ((p0}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{c0)}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{(p1}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{c1))}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(p0}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{p1)}

\CommentTok{\# Chi{-}square difference test(TRd)}
\NormalTok{TRd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (lr)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(cd)}

\CommentTok{\# Degrees of freedom}
\NormalTok{df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(p0 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p1)}


\CommentTok{\# Significance test}
\NormalTok{(p\_diff }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pchisq}\NormalTok{(TRd, df, }\AttributeTok{lower.tail=}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{))}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} [1] 0.6245173}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\textbf{RESULT}: The Log Likelihood \(\chi^2\) difference test comparing the invariant and non-invariant LTA models was, \(\chi^2 (20) = 21.542, p = .624\).

\href{https://stats.idre.ucla.edu/mplus/faq/how-can-i-compute-a-chi-square-test-for-nested-models-with-the-mlr-or-mlm-estimators/}{Reference}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read invariance model and extract parameters (intercepts and multinomial regression coefficients)

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lta\_inv1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"4{-}Class{-}Invariant.out"}\NormalTok{ ), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{par }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as\_tibble}\NormalTok{(lta\_inv1[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}ON|Means\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, paramHeader)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{est =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(est))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Manual method to calculate transition probabilities:

Although possible to extract transition probabilities directly from the output the following code illustrates how the parameters are used to calculate each transition. This is useful for conducting advanced LTA model specifications such as making specific constraints within or between transition matrices, or testing the equivalence of specific transition probabilities.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Name each parameter individually to make the subsequent calculations more readable}
\NormalTok{a1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{13}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); a2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); a3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b21 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b31 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b22 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b32 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b13 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b23 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b33 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{])}

\CommentTok{\# Calculate transition probabilities from the logit parameters}
\NormalTok{t11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t13 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t14 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t12 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t13)}

\NormalTok{t21 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b12)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b12)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b22)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b32)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t22 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b22)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b12)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b22)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b32)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t23 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b32)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b12)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b22)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b32)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t24 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t22 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t23)}

\NormalTok{t31 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b13)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b13)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b23)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b33)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t32 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b23)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b13)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b23)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b33)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t33 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b33)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b13)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b23)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b33)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t34 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t32 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t33)}

\NormalTok{t41 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t42 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t43 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t44 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t41 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t42 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t43)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Create Transition Table}\label{create-transition-table}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Time1"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C1=Anti{-}Science"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Amb. w/ Elevated"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Amb. w/ Minimal"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Pro{-}Science"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Anti{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t11,t21,t31,t41),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Amb. w/ Elevated"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t12,t22,t32,t42),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Amb. w/ Minimal"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t13,t23,t33,t43),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Pro{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t14,t24,t34,t44))}

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{rowname\_col =} \StringTok{"Time1"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_stubhead}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"7th grade"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Student transitions from 7th grade (rows) to 10th grade (columns)**"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\&nbsp;"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"10th grade"}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{columns =} \DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{footnote =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"*Note.* Transition matrix values are the identical to Table 5, however Table 5 }
\StringTok{    has the values rearranged by class for interpretation purposes. Classes may be arranged}
\StringTok{    directly through Mplus syntax using start values."}\NormalTok{), }
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{())}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
