\chapter{Measurement Invariance}\label{measurement-invariance}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\textbf{Data Source}: The data used to illustrate these analyses include elementary school student \emph{Science Attitude} survey items collected during 7th and 10th grades from the \textbf{Longitudinal Study of American Youth} (LSAY; Miller, 2015).

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

To install package \{\texttt{rhdf5}\}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BiocManager"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) }
  \FunctionTok{install.packages}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BiocManager"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\#BiocManager::install("rhdf5")}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\emph{Load packages}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(rhdf5)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)       }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt) }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(reshape2)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(ggrepel)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(haven)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(modelsummary)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(corrplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(DiagrammeR)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(filesstrings)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(PNWColors)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read in LSAY data file, \texttt{lsay\_new.csv}.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lsay\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"data"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lsay\_lta.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"9999"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), as.numeric))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Estimate Latent Transition Analysis (LTA) Model}\label{estimate-latent-transition-analysis-lta-model-1}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Estimate Invariant LTA Model}\label{estimate-invariant-lta-model-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lta\_inv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} 
    \StringTok{"Invariant LTA"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
     \StringTok{"usev = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x  ! 7th grade indicators}
\StringTok{             ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l; ! 10th grade indicators}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      categorical = ab39m{-}ab39x ga33a{-}ga33l;}

\StringTok{      classes = c1(4) c2(4);"}\NormalTok{,}
    
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
     \StringTok{"estimator = mlr;}
\StringTok{      type = mixture;}
\StringTok{      starts = 500 100;}
\StringTok{      processors=10;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} 
     \StringTok{"\%overall\%}
\StringTok{      c2 on c1;}

\StringTok{      MODEL c1: }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (1{-}5);  !!! labels that are repeated will constrain parameters to equality !!!}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (6{-}10);}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (11{-}15);}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (16{-}20);}

\StringTok{      MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (1{-}5);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (6{-}10);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (11{-}15);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (16{-}20);"}\NormalTok{,}
   
  \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} 
   \StringTok{"file = LTA\_Inv\_CPROBS.dat;}
\StringTok{    save = cprob;}
\StringTok{    missflag = 9999;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"tech1 tech15 svalues;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{lta\_inv\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(lta\_inv,}
                 \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                 \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"4{-}class{-}invariant.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
                 \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Estimate Non-Invariant Estimated LTA Model}\label{estimate-non-invariant-estimated-lta-model-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lta\_non\_inv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} 
    \StringTok{"Non{-}Invariant LTA"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
     \StringTok{"usev = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x  ! 7th grade indicators}
\StringTok{             ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l; ! 10th grade indicators}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      categorical = ab39m{-}ab39x ga33a{-}ga33l;}

\StringTok{      classes = c1(4) c2(4);"}\NormalTok{,}
    
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
     \StringTok{"estimator = mlr;}
\StringTok{      type = mixture;}
\StringTok{      starts = 500 100;}
\StringTok{      processors=10;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} 
     \StringTok{"\%overall\%}
\StringTok{      c2 on c1; !!! estimate all multinomial logistic regressions !!!}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      !!! The above syntax can also be written as: !!!}
\StringTok{               ! c2\#1 on c1\#1 c1\#2 c1\#3; !  }
\StringTok{               ! c2\#2 on c1\#1 c1\#2 c1\#3; !}
\StringTok{               ! c2\#3 on c1\#1 c1\#2 c1\#3; !}

\StringTok{      MODEL c1: !!! the following syntax will allow item thresholds to be estimated for each class (e.g. noninvariance) !!!}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1]; }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1];}

\StringTok{      MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1];"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"tech1 tech15 svalues;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{lta\_non\_inv\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(lta\_non\_inv,}
                     \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"4{-}class{-}non{-}invariant.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
                     \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Conduct Sattorra-Bentler adjusted Log Likelihood Ratio Difference Testing}\label{conduct-sattorra-bentler-adjusted-log-likelihood-ratio-difference-testing-1}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  non-invariant (comparison): This model has \textbf{more} parameters.
\item
  invariant (nested): This model has \textbf{less} parameters.
\end{itemize}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# *0 = null or nested model \& *1 = comparison  or parent model}

\NormalTok{lta\_models }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Log Likelihood Values}
\NormalTok{L0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{L1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.non.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{]] }

\CommentTok{\# LRT equation}
\NormalTok{lr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{(L0}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{L1) }

\CommentTok{\# Parameters}
\NormalTok{p0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{]] }
\NormalTok{p1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.non.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{]]}

\CommentTok{\# Scaling Correction Factors}
\NormalTok{c0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LLCorrectionFactor"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{c1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_models[[}\StringTok{"X4.class.non.invariant.out"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"summaries"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"LLCorrectionFactor"}\NormalTok{]]}

\CommentTok{\# Difference Test Scaling correction}
\NormalTok{cd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ((p0}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{c0)}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{(p1}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{c1))}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(p0}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{p1)}

\CommentTok{\# Chi{-}square difference test(TRd)}
\NormalTok{TRd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (lr)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(cd)}

\CommentTok{\# Degrees of freedom}
\NormalTok{df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(p0 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p1)}


\CommentTok{\# Significance test}
\NormalTok{(p\_diff }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{pchisq}\NormalTok{(TRd, df, }\AttributeTok{lower.tail=}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{))}
\CommentTok{\#\textgreater{} [1] 0.6245173}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\textbf{RESULT}: The Log Likelihood \(\chi^2\) difference test comparing the invariant and non-invariant LTA models was, \(\chi^2 (20) = 21.542, p = .624\).

\href{https://stats.idre.ucla.edu/mplus/faq/how-can-i-compute-a-chi-square-test-for-nested-models-with-the-mlr-or-mlm-estimators/}{Reference}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read invariance model and extract parameters (intercepts and multinomial regression coefficients)

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lta\_inv1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"4{-}Class{-}Invariant.out"}\NormalTok{ ), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{par }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as\_tibble}\NormalTok{(lta\_inv1[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}ON|Means\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, paramHeader)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{est =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(est))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Manual method to calculate transition probabilities:

Although possible to extract transition probabilities directly from the output the following code illustrates how the parameters are used to calculate each transition. This is useful for conducting advanced LTA model specifications such as making specific constraints within or between transition matrices, or testing the equivalence of specific transition probabilities.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Name each parameter individually to make the subsequent calculations more readable}
\NormalTok{a1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{13}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); a2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); a3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b21 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b31 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b22 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b32 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b13 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b23 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); b33 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{])}

\CommentTok{\# Calculate transition probabilities from the logit parameters}
\NormalTok{t11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t13 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b11)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b21)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b31)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t14 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t12 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t13)}

\NormalTok{t21 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b12)}\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b12)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b22)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3}\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{b32)}\SpecialCharTok{+}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}

\subsection{Create Transition Table}\label{create-transition-table-1}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Time1"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C1=Anti{-}Science"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Amb. w/ Elevated"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Amb. w/ Minimal"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Pro{-}Science"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Anti{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t11,t21,t31,t41),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Amb. w/ Elevated"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t12,t22,t32,t42),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Amb. w/ Minimal"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t13,t23,t33,t43),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Pro{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t14,t24,t34,t44))}

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{rowname\_col =} \StringTok{"Time1"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_stubhead}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"7th grade"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Student transitions from 7th grade (rows) to 10th grade (columns)**"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\&nbsp;"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"10th grade"}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{columns =} \DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{footnote =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"*Note.* Transition matrix values are the identical to Table 5, however Table 5 }
\StringTok{    has the values rearranged by class for interpretation purposes. Classes may be arranged}
\StringTok{    directly through Mplus syntax using start values."}\NormalTok{), }
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{())}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\chapter{Adding Covariates}\label{adding-covariates}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\textbf{Data Source}: The data used to illustrate these analyses include elementary school student \emph{Science Attitude} survey items collected during 7th and 10th grades from the \textbf{Longitudinal Study of American Youth} (LSAY; Miller, 2015).

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

To install package \{\texttt{rhdf5}\}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BiocManager"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) }
  \FunctionTok{install.packages}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"BiocManager"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\#BiocManager::install("rhdf5")}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\emph{Load packages}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(rhdf5)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)       }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor)            }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt) }
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(reshape2)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(ggrepel)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(haven)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(modelsummary)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(corrplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(DiagrammeR)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(filesstrings)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(PNWColors)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read in LSAY data file, \texttt{lsay\_new.csv}.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lsay\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"data"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lsay\_lta.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"9999"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), as.numeric))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Adding Covariates}\label{adding-covariates-1}

Continuing from the previous section \ref{lta}, we use the ML three-step method to estimate LTA models with predictors and distal outcomes). Estimate the unconditional model for each latent variable with the predictors included in the \texttt{auxiliary} option for at least one of the models.

Covariates

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \texttt{sci\_issues7}: Interest in science issues (1 = Not at all interested, 2 = Moderately Interested, 3 = Very interested)\\
\item
  \texttt{sci\_irt7}: 7th Grade Science IRT Score (Continuous)\\
\item
  \texttt{female}: Gender (0 = Male, 1 = Female)
\end{itemize}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 1 - Estimate Unconditional Model w/ Auxiliary Specification}\label{step-1---estimate-unconditional-model-w-auxiliary-specification}

\emph{7th Grade}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{step1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step 1 {-} T1"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
  \StringTok{"usevar = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x;}
\StringTok{  categorical = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x;}
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   classes = c(4); }
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   auxiliary = sci\_issues7 sci\_irt7 female;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{   idvariable = casenum;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 0;}
\StringTok{    optseed = 534483;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} 
   \StringTok{"File=3step\_t1.dat;}
\StringTok{    Save=cprob;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"residual tech11 tech14 svalues"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{    series = ab39m{-}ab39x(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{step1\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step1,}
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"t1.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"one\_T1.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\emph{10th Grade}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{step1  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step 1 {-} T1"}\NormalTok{, }
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
  \StringTok{"usevar =  ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l;}
\StringTok{  categorical =  ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l;}
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   classes = c(4); }
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{   !auxiliary = sci\_issues7 sci\_irt7 female;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{   idvariable = casenum;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
   \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 0;}
\StringTok{    optseed = 392418;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} 
   \StringTok{"File=3step\_t2.dat;}
\StringTok{    Save=cprob;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"residual tech11 tech14 svalues"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} 
    \StringTok{"type = plot3; }
\StringTok{    series = ga33a{-}ga33l(*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(lsay\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data)}

\NormalTok{step1\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step1,}
                            \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"t2.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"one\_T2.inp"}\NormalTok{) ,}
                            \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\texttt{plot\_lca\_function} requires 5 arguments:

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \texttt{model\_name}: name of Mplus model object (e.g., \texttt{model\_t1\_c4})
\item
  \texttt{item\_num}: the number of items in LCA measurement model (e.g., \texttt{5})
\item
  \texttt{class\_num}: the number of classes (\emph{k}) in LCA model (e.g., \texttt{4})
\item
  \texttt{item\_labels}: the item labels for x-axis (e.g., \texttt{c("Enjoy","Useful","Logical","Job","Adult")})
\item
  \texttt{plot\_title}: include the title of the plot here (e.g., \texttt{"Time\ 1\ LCA\ Conditional\ Item\ Probability\ Plot"})
\end{itemize}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{plot\_lca\_function }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(model\_name,item\_num,class\_num,item\_labels,plot\_title)\{}

\NormalTok{mplus\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(model\_name}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gh5}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{means\_and\_variances\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{estimated\_probs}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{values)}
\NormalTok{plot\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mplus\_model[}\FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{item\_num, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{),]}

\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(model\_name}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{modelEstimated}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{proportion)}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(c\_size) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"cs"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ c\_size }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(cs}\SpecialCharTok{*}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{class\_num, }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:class\_num,]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{plot\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{cbind}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Var =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"U"}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{item\_num), plot\_t1)}
\NormalTok{plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var,}
               \AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ item\_labels)}
\NormalTok{plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fct\_inorder}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var)}
\NormalTok{pd\_long\_t1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{melt}\NormalTok{(plot\_t1, }\AttributeTok{id.vars =} \StringTok{"Var"}\NormalTok{) }

\NormalTok{p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pd\_long\_t1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(Var), }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ value,}
  \AttributeTok{shape =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{colour =}\NormalTok{ variable, }\AttributeTok{lty =}\NormalTok{ variable)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{scale\_x\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{breaks =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ plot\_t1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Var) }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{scale\_colour\_grey}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+} 
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ plot\_title, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Probability"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_cowplot}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{legend.title =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{(), }
        \AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"top"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p}
\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(p)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}

\FunctionTok{plot\_lca\_function}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{model\_name =}\NormalTok{ output\_T1, }
  \AttributeTok{item\_num =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{class\_num =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{item\_labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Enjoy"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Useful"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Logical"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Job"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Adult"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{plot\_title =} \StringTok{"Time 1 LCA Conditional Item Probability Plot"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{plot\_lca\_function}\NormalTok{(}

  \AttributeTok{item\_labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Enjoy"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Useful"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Logical"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Job"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Adult"}\NormalTok{),}

\subsection{Step 2 - Determine Measurement Error}\label{step-2---determine-measurement-error-3}

Extract logits for the classification probabilities for the most likely latent class:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{logit\_cprobs\_T1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_T1[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{                                       [[}\StringTok{"logitProbs.mostLikely"}\NormalTok{]])}

\NormalTok{logit\_cprobs\_T2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_T2[[}\StringTok{"class\_counts"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{                                       [[}\StringTok{"logitProbs.mostLikely"}\NormalTok{]])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Extract saved dataset:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{savedata\_T1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_T1[[}\StringTok{"savedata"}\NormalTok{]])}
\NormalTok{savedata\_T2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(output\_T2[[}\StringTok{"savedata"}\NormalTok{]])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Rename the column in savedata named ``C'' and change to ``N''

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata\_T1)[}\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata\_T1)}\SpecialCharTok{==}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"N\_T1"}
\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata\_T2)[}\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata\_T2)}\SpecialCharTok{==}\StringTok{"C"}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"N\_T2"}

\NormalTok{savedata }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ savedata\_T1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{full\_join}\NormalTok{(savedata\_T2, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"CASENUM"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Step 3 - Add Auxiliary Variables}\label{step-3---add-auxiliary-variables}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{step3  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"ML Three Step LTA Model"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
 \StringTok{"nominal=N\_T1 N\_T2;}
\StringTok{  usevar = N\_T1 N\_T2 SCI\_IRT7 FEMALE;}
\StringTok{  classes = c1(4) c2(4);"}\NormalTok{ ,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
 \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{  type = mixture; }
\StringTok{  starts = 0;"}\NormalTok{,}
 
  \AttributeTok{MODEL =}
  \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
 \StringTok{" \%OVERALL\%}
\StringTok{      }
\StringTok{   c2 on c1; }
\StringTok{   c1 c2 on  SCI\_IRT7 FEMALE;}

\StringTok{  MODEL c1:}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[1,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[3,1]\}]; }
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[4,1]\}]; }
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T1\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T1[4,3]\}];}

\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{  MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[1,1]\}]; }
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[1,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[2,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{ }
\StringTok{   \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#1@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#2@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{  [N\_T2\#3@\{logit\_cprobs\_T2[4,3]\}];"}\NormalTok{),}
 
 
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"tech15;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata), }
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ savedata)}

\NormalTok{step3\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step3,}
               \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"three.dat"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"three.inp"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsubsection{LTA Transition Plot}\label{lta-transition-plot}

This code is adapted from the source code for the \texttt{plotLTA} function found in the \href{https://github.com/michaelhallquist/MplusAutomation/blob/995d1ecfae3656524153456ce647f86fe8c1cf1e/R/mixtures.R}{\textcolor{blue}{MplusAutomation package}}

\textbf{NOTE:} The function found in \texttt{plot\_transitions\_function.R} is specific to a model with 2 time-points and 4-classes \& must be updated to accommodate other models.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"plot\_transitions\_function.R"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{lta\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"three.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\FunctionTok{plot\_transitions\_function}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{model\_name =}\NormalTok{ lta\_model,}
  \AttributeTok{color\_pallete =} \FunctionTok{pnw\_palette}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Bay"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{n=}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{type =} \StringTok{"discrete"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{facet\_labels =}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{1}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Transitions to 10th Grade from the Pro{-}Science w/ Elevated Utility Class"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{2}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Transitions to 10th Grade from the Ambivalent w/ Elevated Utility Class"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{3}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Transitions to 10th Grade from the Ambivalent w/ Minimal Utility Class"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{4}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Transitions to 10th Grade from the Anti{-}Science w/ Minimal Utility Class"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{timepoint\_labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}1\textquotesingle{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"7th Grade"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}2\textquotesingle{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"10th Grade"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{class\_labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Pro{-}Science"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Amb. / Elev. Utility"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Amb. / Min. Utility"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Anti{-}Science"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{22-lta-cov_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-15-1.pdf}}

\begin{Shaded}

\NormalTok{lta\_prob }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(lta\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{transitionProbs}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{probability)}


\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"7th Grade"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Pro{-}Science"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Amb. / Elev. Utility"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Amb. / Min. Utility"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"Anti{-}Science"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"Pro{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]),}
  \StringTok{"Amb. / Elev. Utility"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]),}
  \StringTok{"Amb. / Min. Utility"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]),}
  \StringTok{"Anti{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{13}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],lta\_prob[}\DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]))}

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{rowname\_col =} \StringTok{"7th Grade"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_stubhead}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"7th Grade"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Transition Probabilities**"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"10th Grade"}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{columns =} \DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{)}\CommentTok{\#\%\textgreater{}\% }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Covariate Table}\label{covariate-table}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# REFERENCE CLASS 4}
\NormalTok{cov }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(lta\_model[[}\StringTok{"parameters"}\NormalTok{]][[}\StringTok{"unstandardized"}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(param }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"SCI\_IRT7"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{            param }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"SCI\_IRT7"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Science IRT Score"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{            param }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"FEMALE"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Gender"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(se,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{nsmall =}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{separate}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\AttributeTok{into =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Time"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Class"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{"\#"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Class =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{            Class }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"1.ON"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Pro{-}Science"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{            Class }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"2.ON"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Amb. / Elev. Utility"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{            Class }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"3.ON"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Amb. / Min. Utility"}\NormalTok{),}
         \AttributeTok{Time =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{            Time }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"C1"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"7th Grade (T1)"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{            Time }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"C2"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"10th Grade (T2)"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{         )}
\NormalTok{         ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{unite}\NormalTok{(estimate, est, se, }\AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(Time}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{pval, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{est\_se) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textless{}.001*"}\NormalTok{),}
                       \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval}\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"*"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{                              scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(pval, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{))))}


\CommentTok{\# Create table}

\NormalTok{cov\_m1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cov }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(param, Class) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Relations Between the Covariates and Latent Class"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{footnote =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"Reference Group: Anti{-}Science"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
\AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Covariate"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{estimate =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Estimate (*se*)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{pval =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{sub\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
              \AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{sub\_values}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{999.000}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{replacement =} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{table.font.names =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{) }

\NormalTok{cov\_m1}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Manually calculate transition probabilities by covariate}\label{manually-calculate-transition-probabilities-by-covariate}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{step3  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"LTA (invariant)"}\NormalTok{, }
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} 
 \StringTok{"usevar = ab39m ab39t ab39u ab39w ab39x  ! 7th grade indicators}
\StringTok{               ga33a ga33h ga33i ga33k ga33l FEMALE;}
\StringTok{  categorical = ab39m{-}ab39x ga33a{-}ga33l;}
\StringTok{  classes = c1(4) c2(4);"}\NormalTok{ ,}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
 \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{  type = mixture; }
\StringTok{  starts = 500 100;}
\StringTok{ processors = 10;"}\NormalTok{,}
 
  \AttributeTok{MODEL =}
  \StringTok{"\%overall\%}

\StringTok{    c2 c1 on FEMALE;}

\StringTok{      c2\#1 on c1\#1 (b11);}
\StringTok{      c2\#2 on c1\#1 (b21);}
\StringTok{      c2\#3 on c1\#1 (b31);}
\StringTok{    }
\StringTok{      c2\#1 on c1\#2 (b12);}
\StringTok{      c2\#2 on c1\#2 (b22);}
\StringTok{      c2\#3 on c1\#2 (b32);    }

\StringTok{      c2\#1 on c1\#3 (b13);}
\StringTok{      c2\#2 on c1\#3 (b23);}
\StringTok{      c2\#3 on c1\#3 (b33);}

\StringTok{      [c2\#1] (a1);}
\StringTok{      [c2\#2] (a2);}
\StringTok{      [c2\#3] (a3);}

\StringTok{     c2\#1 ON female (b212);}
\StringTok{     c2\#2 ON female (b222);}
\StringTok{     c2\#3 ON female (b232);}
\StringTok{     c1\#1 ON female (b112);}
\StringTok{     c1\#2 ON female (b122);}
\StringTok{     c1\#3 ON female (b132);}

\StringTok{      MODEL c1: }
\StringTok{      \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (1{-}5);  !!! labels that are repeated will constrain parameters to equality !!!}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (6{-}10);}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (11{-}15);}
\StringTok{      \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [AB39M$1{-}AB39X$1] (16{-}20);}

\StringTok{      MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (1{-}5);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (6{-}10);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (11{-}15);}
\StringTok{      \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [GA33A$1{-}GA33L$1] (16{-}20);"}\NormalTok{,}
 
 
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"tech1 tech15 svalues;"}\NormalTok{,}
 
  \AttributeTok{MODELCONSTRAINT =} \StringTok{"  ! Compute joint and marginal probabilities:}
\StringTok{        New(}
\StringTok{        t11 t12 t13 t14}
\StringTok{        t21 t22 t23 t24}
\StringTok{        t31 t32 t33 t34}
\StringTok{        t41 t42 t43 t44}

\StringTok{        t11B t12B t13B t14B}
\StringTok{        t21B t22B t23B t24B}
\StringTok{        t31B t32B t33B t34B}
\StringTok{        t41B t42B t43B t44B}
\StringTok{        }
\StringTok{        diff\_11\_22 x}
\StringTok{        }
\StringTok{       );}

\StringTok{        t11 = exp(a1 +b11)/(exp(a1+b11)+exp(a2+b21)+exp(a3+b31)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t12 = exp(a2 +b21)/(exp(a1+b11)+exp(a2+b21)+exp(a3+b31)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t13 = exp(a3 +b31)/(exp(a1+b11)+exp(a2+b21)+exp(a3+b31)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t14 = 1 {-} (t11+t12+t13);}

\StringTok{        t21 = exp(a1 +b12)/(exp(a1+b12)+exp(a2+b22)+exp(a3+b32)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t22 = exp(a2 +b22)/(exp(a1+b12)+exp(a2+b22)+exp(a3+b32)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t23 = exp(a3 +b32)/(exp(a1+b12)+exp(a2+b22)+exp(a3+b32)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t24 = 1 {-} (t21+t22+t23);}

\StringTok{        t31 = exp(a1 +b13)/(exp(a1+b13)+exp(a2+b23)+exp(a3+b33)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t32 = exp(a2 +b23)/(exp(a1+b13)+exp(a2+b23)+exp(a3+b33)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t33 = exp(a3 +b33)/(exp(a1+b13)+exp(a2+b23)+exp(a3+b33)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t34 = 1 {-} (t31+t32+t33);}

\StringTok{        t41 = exp(a1)/(exp(a1)+exp(a2)+exp(a3)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t42 = exp(a2)/(exp(a1)+exp(a2)+exp(a3)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t43 = exp(a3)/(exp(a1)+exp(a2)+exp(a3)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{        t44 = 1 {-} (t41+t42+t43);}
\StringTok{        }
\StringTok{        }
\StringTok{     !c1\#3 ON female (b132);}

\StringTok{ x= 1  ; ! x=1 is female, x=0 males}

\StringTok{t11B = exp(a1 +b11+b212*x)/(exp(a1+b11+b212*x)+exp(a2+b21+b222*x)+exp(a3+b31+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t12B = exp(a2 +b21+b222*x)/(exp(a1+b11+b212*x)+exp(a2+b21+b222*x)+exp(a3+b31+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t13B = exp(a3 +b31+b232*x)/(exp(a1+b11+b212*x)+exp(a2+b21+b222*x)+exp(a3+b31+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t14B = 1 {-} (t11B+t12B+t13B);}

\StringTok{t21B = exp(a1 +b12+b212*x)/(exp(a1+b12+b212*x)+exp(a2+b22+b222*x)+exp(a3+b32+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t22B = exp(a2 +b22+b222*x)/(exp(a1+b12+b212*x)+exp(a2+b22+b222*x)+exp(a3+b32+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t23B = exp(a3 +b32+b232*x)/(exp(a1+b12+b212*x)+exp(a2+b22+b222*x)+exp(a3+b32+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t24B = 1 {-} (t21B+t22B+t23B);}

\StringTok{t31B = exp(a1 +b13+b212*x)/(exp(a1+b13+b212*x)+exp(a2+b23+b222*x)+exp(a3+b33+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t32B = exp(a2 +b23+b222*x)/(exp(a1+b13+b212*x)+exp(a2+b23+b222*x)+exp(a3+b33+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t33B = exp(a3 +b33+b232*x)/(exp(a1+b13+b212*x)+exp(a2+b23+b222*x)+exp(a3+b33+b232*x)}
\StringTok{+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t34B = 1 {-} (t31B+t32B+t33B);}

\StringTok{t41B = exp(a1+b212*x)/(exp(a1+b212*x)+exp(a2+b222*x)+exp(a3+b232*x)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t42B = exp(a2+b222*x)/(exp(a1+b212*x)+exp(a2+b222*x)+exp(a3+b232*x)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t43B = exp(a3+b232*x)/(exp(a1+b212*x)+exp(a2+b222*x)+exp(a3+b232*x)+exp(0));}
\StringTok{t44B = 1 {-} (t41B+t42B+t43B);}

\StringTok{        diff\_11\_22= t11{-}t11B;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(savedata), }
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ savedata)}

\NormalTok{step3\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(step3,}
               \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"calc\_tran.dat"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"cov\_model"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"calc\_tran.inp"}\NormalTok{), }
               \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

         \AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"b11"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b12"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b13"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b21"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b22"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b23"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b31"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b32"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b33"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b212"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b222"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b232"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b112"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b122"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"b132"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"a11"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"a21"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"a31"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"a12"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"a22"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"a32"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Manual method to calculate transition probabilities by covariate:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Name each parameter individually to make the subsequent calculations more readable}
\NormalTok{a1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{19}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }
\NormalTok{a2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }
\NormalTok{a3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{21}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}

\NormalTok{b11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b21 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }
\NormalTok{b31 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }

\NormalTok{b12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }
\NormalTok{b22 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b32 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }

\NormalTok{b13 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }
\NormalTok{b23 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]); }
\NormalTok{b33 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}

\NormalTok{b212 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b222 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b232 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}

\NormalTok{b112 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{13}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b122 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}
\NormalTok{b132 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(par[}\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{]);}

\NormalTok{x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0} \CommentTok{\# x=1 is female, x=0 males}

\CommentTok{\# Calculate transition probabilities from the logit parameters}
\NormalTok{t11B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t12B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t13B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{t31B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b13 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b13 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b23 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b33 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{t34B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t31B }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t32B }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t33B)}

\NormalTok{t41B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t42B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t43B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t44B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t41B }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t42B }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t43B)}

\NormalTok{x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \CommentTok{\# x=1 is female, x=0 males}

\CommentTok{\# Calculate transition probabilities from the logit parameters}
\NormalTok{t11 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t13 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a1 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b212}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a2 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b21 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b222}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(a3 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b31 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ b232}\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{x) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{t14 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ (t11 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t12 }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ t13)}

Create table

\subsection{Create Transition Table}\label{create-transition-table-2}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Time1"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"C1=Anti{-}Science"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Amb. w/ Elevated"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Amb. w/ Minimal"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"C1=Pro{-}Science"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Anti{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t11,t21,t31,t41),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Amb. w/ Elevated"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t12,t22,t32,t42),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Amb. w/ Minimal"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t13,t23,t33,t43),}
  \StringTok{"C2=Pro{-}Science"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(t14,t24,t34,t44))}

\NormalTok{t\_matrix }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{rowname\_col =} \StringTok{"Time1"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_stubhead}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"7th grade"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**FEMALES: Student transitions from 7th grade (rows) to 10th grade (columns)**"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"10th grade"}\NormalTok{,}\AttributeTok{columns =} \DecValTok{2}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{footnote =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"*Note.* Transition matrix values are the identical to Table 5, however Table 5 }
\StringTok{    has the values rearranged by class for interpretation purposes. Classes may be arranged}
\StringTok{    directly through Mplus syntax using start values."}\NormalTok{), }
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{())}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\part{Extensions of Latent Class Models}\label{part-extensions-of-latent-class-models}

\chapter{Moderation}\label{moderation}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\emph{Example: Longitudinal Study of American Youth}

\textbf{Data source:} : \href{https://www.lsay.org/}{See documentation here}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Load Packages}\label{load-packages-11}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(MplusAutomation)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(tidyverse)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(here)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(glue)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(gt)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(cowplot)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(kableExtra)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(psych)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(float)}
\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(janitor)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Moderation Path Diagram}\label{moderation-path-diagram}

\includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{figures/moderation_diagram}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large \textbf{LCA Indicators \& Auxiliary Variables: Math Attitudes Example}} \\ 
{\small ~}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}ll}
\toprule
Name &  Variable Description \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
\multicolumn{2}{l}{} \\[2.5pt] 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
enjoy & I enjoy math. \\ 
useful & Math is useful in everyday problems. \\ 
logical & Math helps a person think logically. \\ 
job & It is important to know math to get a good job. \\ 
adult & I will use math in many ways as an adult. \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
\multicolumn{2}{l}{Auxiliary Variables} \\[2.5pt] 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
female & Self-reported student gender (0=Male, 1=Female). \\ 
math\_irt & Standardized IRT math test score - 12th grade. \\ 
\bottomrule
\end{tabular*}
\end{table}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Read in LSAY dataset

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"data"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lsay\_subset.csv"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{clean\_names}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}   \CommentTok{\# make variable names lowercase}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{female =} \FunctionTok{recode}\NormalTok{(gender, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{1}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{2}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\CommentTok{\# relabel values from 1,2 to 0,1}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Descriptive Statistics}\label{descriptive-statistics-11}

\subsection{Descriptive Statistics using R:}\label{descriptive-statistics-using-r}

Quick view of all the relevant variables:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult, female, math\_irt) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{describe}\NormalTok{()}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Proportion of indicators using R:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Set up data to find proportions of binary indicators}
\NormalTok{ds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"Variable"}\NormalTok{) }

\CommentTok{\# Create table of variables and counts}
\NormalTok{tab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{table}\NormalTok{(ds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Variable, ds}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{value)}

\CommentTok{\# Find proportions and round to 3 decimal places}
\NormalTok{prop }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prop.table}\NormalTok{(tab, }\AttributeTok{margin =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Combine everything to one table }
\NormalTok{dframe }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Variables=}\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(tab), }\AttributeTok{Proportion=}\NormalTok{prop[,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{Count=}\NormalTok{tab[,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{])}
\CommentTok{\#remove row names}
\FunctionTok{row.names}\NormalTok{(dframe) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NULL}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(dframe) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
\FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**LCA Indicator Proportions**"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\&nbsp;"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{column\_labels.font.weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{row\_group.font.weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{) }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{\texorpdfstring{Descriptive Statistics using \texttt{MplusAutomation}:}{Descriptive Statistics using MplusAutomation:}}\label{descriptive-statistics-using-mplusautomation}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{basic\_mplus  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"LSAL Descriptive Statistics;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =}
    \StringTok{"usevar = enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult, female, math\_irt;}
\StringTok{    categorical = enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult, female;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} \StringTok{"TYPE=basic;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"sampstat;"}\NormalTok{,  }
  
  \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(data),}
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ data)}

\NormalTok{basic\_mplus\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(basic\_mplus, }
                            \AttributeTok{dataout =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"moderation"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"LSAL\_data.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{modelout =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"moderation"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"basic.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
                            \AttributeTok{check =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

View the \texttt{.out} file:

\begin{center}\includegraphics[width=6.86in]{figures/sampstat} \end{center}

Or, view of descriptive statistics using \texttt{get\_sampstat()}:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Using MplusAutomation}
\NormalTok{MplusAutomation}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{get\_sampstat}\NormalTok{(basic\_mplus\_fit)}

\CommentTok{\# Using base R}
\FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(data)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Enumeration}\label{enumeration-5}

This code uses the \texttt{mplusObject} function in the \texttt{MplusAutomation} package and saves all model runs in the \texttt{mplus\_enum} folder.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{lca\_enum\_6  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(k) \{}
\NormalTok{  lca\_enum  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
    
    \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\{k\}{-}Class"}\NormalTok{), }
    
    \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"categorical = enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult; }
\StringTok{     usevar = enjoy, useful, logical, job, adult;}
\StringTok{     classes = c(\{k\});"}\NormalTok{),}
    
    \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} 
      \StringTok{"estimator = mlr; }
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    processors = 12;}
\StringTok{    starts = 500 100;"}\NormalTok{,}
    
    \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"sampstat residual tech11 tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}

    \AttributeTok{usevariables =} \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(data),}
    \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ data)}
  
\NormalTok{  lca\_enum\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(lca\_enum, }
                               \AttributeTok{dataout=}\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"moderation"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"LSAY\_data.dat"}\NormalTok{)),}
                               \AttributeTok{modelout=}\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"moderation"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"c\{k\}\_lsal.inp"}\NormalTok{)) ,}
                               \AttributeTok{check=}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\})}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\textbf{IMPORTANT}: Before moving forward, make sure to examine each output document to ensure models were estimated normally. In this example, the last model (6-class models) did not produce reliable output and was excluded.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Table of Fit}\label{table-of-fit-3}

First, extract data:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"extract\_mplus\_info.R"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Define the directory where all of the .out files are located.}
\NormalTok{output\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"moderation"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"enum"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Get all .out files}
\NormalTok{output\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list.files}\NormalTok{(output\_dir, }\AttributeTok{pattern =} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.out$"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{full.names =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Process all .out files into one dataframe}
\NormalTok{final\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(output\_files, extract\_mplus\_info\_extended)}

\CommentTok{\# Extract Sample\_Size from final\_data}
\NormalTok{sample\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(final\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Sample\_Size)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

c3\_lsal.out & 3-Class & THE BEST LOGLIKELIHOOD VALUE HAS BEEN REPLICATED.  RERUN WITH AT LEAST TWICE THE RANDOM STARTS TO CHECK THAT THE BEST LOGLIKELIHOOD IS STILL OBTAINED AND REPLICATED.   \\ 
c4\_lsal.out & 4-Class & THE BEST LOGLIKELIHOOD VALUE HAS BEEN REPLICATED.  RERUN WITH AT LEAST TWICE THE RANDOM STARTS TO CHECK THAT THE BEST LOGLIKELIHOOD IS STILL OBTAINED AND REPLICATED.       IN THE OPTIMIZATION, ONE OR MORE LOGIT THRESHOLDS APPROACHED EXTREME VALUES      OF -15.000 AND 15.000 AND WERE FIXED TO STABILIZE MODEL ESTIMATION.  THESE      VALUES IMPLY PROBABILITIES OF 0 AND 1.  IN THE MODEL RESULTS SECTION, THESE      PARAMETERS HAVE 0 STANDARD ERRORS AND 999 IN THE Z-SCORE AND P-VALUE COLUMNS.     \\ 
c5\_lsal.out & 5-Class & THE BEST LOGLIKELIHOOD VALUE HAS BEEN REPLICATED.  RERUN WITH AT LEAST TWICE THE RANDOM STARTS TO CHECK THAT THE BEST LOGLIKELIHOOD IS STILL OBTAINED AND REPLICATED.
