\subsection{Examine Convergence Information}\label{examine-convergence-information}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Load function}
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"summary\_table.R"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Helper: clean + prep for each dataset}
\NormalTok{prepare\_convergence\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data\_object, grade\_label) \{}
\NormalTok{  sample\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data\_object}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Sample\_Size[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}

\NormalTok{  data\_flat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data\_object }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{LogLikelihoods, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{Errors, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{Warnings) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        Best\_LogLikelihood,}
\NormalTok{        Perc\_Convergence,}
\NormalTok{        Replicated\_LL\_Perc,}
\NormalTok{        Smallest\_Class\_Perc,}
\NormalTok{        Condition\_Number}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, .))}
\NormalTok{    ))}

\NormalTok{  tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{create\_flextable}\NormalTok{(data\_flat, sample\_size)}

  \CommentTok{\# Get actual number of columns in the flextable object}
\NormalTok{  n\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{body}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{col\_keys)}

  \CommentTok{\# Title string}
\NormalTok{  title\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"LCA Convergence Table — \{grade\_label\} Grade (N = \{sample\_size\})"}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# This is the correct call: title as one string, colwidth = full span}
\NormalTok{  tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{add\_header\_row}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    tbl,}
    \AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ title\_text,}
    \AttributeTok{colwidths =}\NormalTok{ n\_cols}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{fontsize}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{bg}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bg =} \StringTok{"\#ffffff"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{)}

  \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(tbl)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Create tables}
\NormalTok{summary\_table\_g7  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prepare\_convergence\_table}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g7, }\StringTok{"7th"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{summary\_table\_g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prepare\_convergence\_table}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g10, }\StringTok{"10th"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{summary\_table\_g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{prepare\_convergence\_table}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g12, }\StringTok{"12th"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{summary\_table\_g7 }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Save Convergence Tables

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Save convergence tables as PNGs}
\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{save\_as\_image}\NormalTok{(summary\_table\_g7,  }\AttributeTok{path =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"convergence\_g7\_lca.png"}\NormalTok{)))}
\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{save\_as\_image}\NormalTok{(summary\_table\_g10, }\AttributeTok{path =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"convergence\_g10\_lca.png"}\NormalTok{)))}
\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{save\_as\_image}\NormalTok{(summary\_table\_g12, }\AttributeTok{path =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"convergence\_g12\_lca.png"}\NormalTok{)))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Load the function file containing generate\_ll\_replication\_plots and create\_ll\_replication\_table\_all}

\CommentTok{\# Load the second function from ll\_replication\_processing.R}
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ll\_replication\_processing.R"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Examine Loglikelihood Replication Information}\label{examine-loglikelihood-replication-information}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Generate replication plots (invisible, for diagnostic use)}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_tables\_g7  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_ll\_replication\_plots}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g7)}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_tables\_g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_ll\_replication\_plots}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g10)}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_tables\_g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{generate\_ll\_replication\_plots}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g12)}

\CommentTok{\# Create replication tables}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_table\_g7 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{create\_ll\_replication\_table\_all}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g7)}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_table\_g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{create\_ll\_replication\_table\_all}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g10)}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_table\_g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{create\_ll\_replication\_table\_all}\NormalTok{(final\_data\_g12)}

\CommentTok{\# Add visible title row to each table}
\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_table\_g7 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{add\_header\_row}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  ll\_replication\_table\_g7,}
  \AttributeTok{values =} \StringTok{"Log{-}Likelihood Replication Table — 7th Grade LCA"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{colwidths =} \FunctionTok{ncol}\NormalTok{(ll\_replication\_table\_g7}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{body}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{dataset)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fontsize}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{bg}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bg =} \StringTok{"\#ffffff"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{ll\_replication\_table\_g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{add\_header\_row}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  ll\_replication\_table\_g10,}
  \AttributeTok{values =} \StringTok{"Log{-}Likelihood Replication Table — 10th Grade LCA"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{colwidths =} \FunctionTok{ncol}\NormalTok{(ll\_replication\_table\_g10}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{body}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{dataset)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fontsize}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{bg}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{i =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bg =} \StringTok{"\#ffffff"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{part =} \StringTok{"header"}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(\{}
\NormalTok{  flextable}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{save\_as\_image}\NormalTok{(ll\_replication\_table\_g7, }\AttributeTok{path =}\NormalTok{ here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ll\_replication\_table\_g7.png"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  flextable}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{save\_as\_image}\NormalTok{(ll\_replication\_table\_g10, }\AttributeTok{path =}\NormalTok{ here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ll\_replication\_table\_g10.png"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  flextable}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{save\_as\_image}\NormalTok{(ll\_replication\_table\_g12, }\AttributeTok{path =}\NormalTok{ here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ll\_replication\_table\_g12.png"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{\})}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Examine Model Fit for Optimal Solution}\label{examine-model-fit-for-optimal-solution}

We evaluate model fit for each grade-level LCA to identify the optimal number of latent profiles. Fit statistics such as BIC, entropy, and likelihood ratio tests (LMR and BLRT) are compared across models. The goal is to select the most parsimonious solution that provides clear separation between classes and replicates reliably. These selections will form the basis for the longitudinal model in the next stage.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Extract fit statistics

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Define grade{-}specific folders and data}
\NormalTok{grades }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"g7"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g10"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g12"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{folder\_paths }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{g7 =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"g7\_enum"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{g10 =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"g10\_enum"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{g12 =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"g12\_enum"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{final\_data\_list }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{g7 =}\NormalTok{ final\_data\_g7,}
  \AttributeTok{g10 =}\NormalTok{ final\_data\_g10,}
  \AttributeTok{g12 =}\NormalTok{ final\_data\_g12}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Initialize storage}
\NormalTok{output\_models\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{allFit\_list }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{()}

\CommentTok{\# Process each grade}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (grade }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ grades) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Get all .out files (1{-}8 classes)}
\NormalTok{  out\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list.files}\NormalTok{(folder\_paths[grade], }\AttributeTok{pattern =} \StringTok{"\^{}c[1{-}8]\_g}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.out$"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{full.names =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Read Mplus output files}
\NormalTok{  output\_models }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{()}
  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (file }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ out\_files) \{}
\NormalTok{    model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(file, }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(model) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(model) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{      output\_models[[}\FunctionTok{basename}\NormalTok{(file)]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ model}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Store models}
\NormalTok{  output\_models\_all[[grade]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ output\_models}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Extract summary table}
\NormalTok{  model\_extract }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{LatexSummaryTable}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    output\_models,}
    \AttributeTok{keepCols =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Title"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Parameters"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"LL"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"BIC"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"aBIC"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"T11\_VLMR\_PValue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"BLRT\_PValue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Observations"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Entropy"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{sortBy =} \StringTok{"Title"}
\NormalTok{  )}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Compute additional fit indices}
\NormalTok{  allFit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ model\_extract }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{Title =} \FunctionTok{str\_trim}\NormalTok{(Title),}
      \AttributeTok{Grade =} \FunctionTok{toupper}\NormalTok{(grade),}
      \AttributeTok{Classes =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str\_extract}\NormalTok{(Title, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+"}\NormalTok{)), }\CommentTok{\# Extract class number}
      \AttributeTok{File\_Name =} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(output\_models),}
      \AttributeTok{CAIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ LL }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ Parameters }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(Observations) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{AWE =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ LL }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ Parameters }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{log}\NormalTok{(Observations) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FloatTok{1.5}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{SIC =} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FloatTok{0.5} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ BIC,}
      \AttributeTok{expSIC =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(SIC }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(SIC, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
      \AttributeTok{BF =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(SIC)), }\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(SIC }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(SIC))),}
      \AttributeTok{cmPk =}\NormalTok{ expSIC }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(expSIC, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(Classes)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Clean Class\_Model for joining}
\NormalTok{  final\_data\_clean }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ final\_data\_list[[grade]] }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{Classes =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str\_extract}\NormalTok{(Class\_Model, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(Class\_Model, Classes, Perc\_Convergence, Replicated\_LL\_Perc, Smallest\_Class, Smallest\_Class\_Perc)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Merge with final\_data}
\NormalTok{  allFit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ allFit }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      final\_data\_clean,}
      \AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"Classes"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{Smallest\_Class\_Combined =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(Smallest\_Class, }\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u00A0("}\NormalTok{, Smallest\_Class\_Perc, }\StringTok{"\%)"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{relocate}\NormalTok{(Grade, Classes, Parameters, LL, Perc\_Convergence, Replicated\_LL\_Perc, }\AttributeTok{.before =}\NormalTok{ BIC) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      Grade, Classes, Parameters, LL, Perc\_Convergence, Replicated\_LL\_Perc,}
\NormalTok{      BIC, aBIC, CAIC, AWE, T11\_VLMR\_PValue, BLRT\_PValue, Entropy, Smallest\_Class\_Combined, BF, cmPk}
\NormalTok{    )}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Store fit data}
\NormalTok{  allFit\_list[[grade]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ allFit}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Combine fit data}
\NormalTok{allFit\_combined }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(allFit\_list) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(Grade, Classes)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Examine Fit Statistics}\label{examine-fit-statistics}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Initialize list to store tables}
\NormalTok{fit\_tables }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{()}

\CommentTok{\# Create and render table for each grade}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (grade }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ grades) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Filter data for current grade}
\NormalTok{  allFit\_grade }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ allFit\_combined }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(Grade }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{toupper}\NormalTok{(grade)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{Perc\_Convergence, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{Replicated\_LL\_Perc) }\CommentTok{\# Exclude convergence columns}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Create table}
\NormalTok{  fit\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ allFit\_grade }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Model Fit Summary Table for \%s Grade**"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{toupper}\NormalTok{(grade)))) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"Model Fit Indices"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(BIC, aBIC, CAIC, AWE)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"LRTs"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(T11\_VLMR\_PValue, BLRT\_PValue)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_spanner}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Smallest\textbackslash{}u00A0Class"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(Smallest\_Class\_Combined)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{Grade =} \StringTok{"Grade"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{Classes =} \StringTok{"Classes"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{Parameters =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"npar"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{LL =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*LL*"}\NormalTok{),}
      \CommentTok{\# Perc\_Convergence = "\% Converged", \# Commented out}
      \CommentTok{\# Replicated\_LL\_Perc = "\% Replicated", \# Commented out}
      \AttributeTok{BIC =} \StringTok{"BIC"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{aBIC =} \StringTok{"aBIC"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{CAIC =} \StringTok{"CAIC"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{AWE =} \StringTok{"AWE"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{T11\_VLMR\_PValue =} \StringTok{"VLMR"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{BLRT\_PValue =} \StringTok{"BLRT"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{Entropy =} \StringTok{"Entropy"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{Smallest\_Class\_Combined =} \StringTok{"n (\%)"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{BF =} \StringTok{"BF"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{cmPk =} \StringTok{"cmPk"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_footnote}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{footnote =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}
        \StringTok{"*Note.* npar = Parameters; *LL* = model log likelihood;}
\StringTok{        BIC = Bayesian information criterion;}
\StringTok{        aBIC = sample size adjusted BIC; CAIC = consistent Akaike information criterion;}
\StringTok{        AWE = approximate weight of evidence criterion;}
\StringTok{        BLRT = bootstrapped likelihood ratio test p{-}value;}
\StringTok{        VLMR = Vuong{-}Lo{-}Mendell{-}Rubin adjusted likelihood ratio test p{-}value;}
\StringTok{        Smallest n (\%) = Number of cases in the smallest class."}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_title}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{column\_labels.font.weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(LL, BIC, aBIC, CAIC, AWE, Entropy, BF, cmPk),}
      \AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{fmt}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(T11\_VLMR\_PValue, BLRT\_PValue),}
      \AttributeTok{fns =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x), }\StringTok{"—"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(x }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textless{}.001"}\NormalTok{, scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{number}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{accuracy =}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{01}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{cols\_align}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{)),}
      \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
        \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ BIC, }\AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ BIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(BIC)),}
        \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ aBIC, }\AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ aBIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(aBIC)),}
        \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ CAIC, }\AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ CAIC }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(CAIC)),}
        \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ AWE, }\AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ AWE }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(AWE)),}
        \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ T11\_VLMR\_PValue,}
          \AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ T11\_VLMR\_PValue }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(T11\_VLMR\_PValue, }\AttributeTok{default =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05}
\NormalTok{        ),}
        \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ BLRT\_PValue,}
          \AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ BLRT\_PValue }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(BLRT\_PValue, }\AttributeTok{default =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{05}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Store table}
\NormalTok{  fit\_tables[[grade]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_table}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Render table without markdown header}
  \CommentTok{\# cat(sprintf("\textbackslash{}n\#\#\# LCA Fit Table for \%s Grade\textbackslash{}n", toupper(grade))) \# Commented out to avoid markdown headers}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(fit\_table)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

BIC = Bayesian information criterion;
aBIC = sample size adjusted BIC; CAIC = consistent Akaike information criterion;
AWE = approximate weight of evidence criterion;

\CommentTok{\# Save tables as PNG files}

\section{Create and Examine Probability Plots for Four Class Solution}\label{create-and-examine-probability-plots-for-four-class-solution}

To aid in interpretation, we visualize the conditional response probabilities for the selected four-class solution at each grade. These plots show the probability of endorsing each response category within each latent profile and help clarify how the classes

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Source plot\_lca function}
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"plot\_lca.txt"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Define grades and folders}
\NormalTok{grades }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"g7"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g10"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g12"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{folder\_paths }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{g7 =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"g7\_enum"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{g10 =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"g10\_enum"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{g12 =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"g12\_enum"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Generate plot for each grade}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (grade }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ grades) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Read 4{-}class model}
\NormalTok{  model\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(folder\_paths[grade], }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"c4\_"}\NormalTok{, grade, }\StringTok{".out"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(model\_file, }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Base plot}
\NormalTok{  base\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_lca}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{model\_name =}\NormalTok{ model)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Get class sizes and round to 1 decimal}
\NormalTok{  c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{modelEstimated}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{proportion }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Customize plot with generic class labels}
\NormalTok{  final\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ base\_plot }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_colour\_discrete}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 1 (\{c\_size[1]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 2 (\{c\_size[2]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 3 (\{c\_size[3]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 4 (\{c\_size[4]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_shape\_discrete}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 1 (\{c\_size[1]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 2 (\{c\_size[2]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 3 (\{c\_size[3]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 4 (\{c\_size[4]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_linetype\_discrete}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 1 (\{c\_size[1]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 2 (\{c\_size[2]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 3 (\{c\_size[3]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Class 4 (\{c\_size[4]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"4{-}Class LCA Item Probability Plot for Grade \{toupper(grade)\}"}\NormalTok{))}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Display plot}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(final\_plot)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{28-tc-lta_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-25-1}
\includegraphics[width=0.95\linewidth]{28-tc-lta_files/figure-latex/unnamed-chunk-25-2}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Conduct step 1: Invariant Latent Transition Analysis}\label{conduct-step-1-invariant-latent-transition-analysis}

In Step 1 of the latent transition analysis (LTA), we estimate an unconditional longitudinal model with measurement invariance across timepoints. This means that item-response thresholds are constrained to be equal across Grades 7, 10, and 12, allowing us to interpret latent class transitions over time on a consistent measurement scale. This step provides the foundation for the 3-step approach by establishing a stable class structure across waves.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Define LTA model}
\NormalTok{lta\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"4{-}Class LTA for G7, G10, G12"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"categorical = AB39A AB39H AB39I AB39K AB39L AB39M AB39T AB39U AB39W AB39X}
\StringTok{                   GA32A GA32H GA32I GA32K GA32L GA33A GA33H GA33I GA33K GA33L}
\StringTok{                   KA46A KA46H KA46I KA46K KA46L KA47A KA47H KA47I KA47K KA47L;}
\StringTok{     usevar = AB39A AB39H AB39I AB39K AB39L AB39M AB39T AB39U AB39W AB39X}
\StringTok{              GA32A GA32H GA32I GA32K GA32L GA33A GA33H GA33I GA33K GA33L}
\StringTok{              KA46A KA46H KA46I KA46K KA46L KA47A KA47H KA47I KA47K KA47L}
\StringTok{               FEMALE MINORITY STEM STEMSUP ENGINEER MATHG8 SCIG8 MATHG11 SCIG11}
\StringTok{               MATHG7 MATHG10 MATHG12;}
\StringTok{     auxiliary = FEMALE MINORITY STEM STEMSUP ENGINEER MATHG8 SCIG8 MATHG11 SCIG11}
\StringTok{     MATHG7 MATHG10 MATHG12;}
\StringTok{     missing = all(9999);}
\StringTok{     classes = c1(4) c2(4) c3(4);}
\StringTok{    auxiliary = stem;"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  
  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{    estimator = mlr;}
\StringTok{    type = mixture;}
\StringTok{    starts = 500 10;}
\StringTok{    processors = 4;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"\%overall\%}
\StringTok{     c2 on c1;}
\StringTok{     c3 on c2;}
\StringTok{     }
\StringTok{     MODEL c1:}
\StringTok{     \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{     [AB39A$1{-}AB39X$1] (1{-}10);}
\StringTok{     \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{     [AB39A$1{-}AB39X$1] (11{-}20);}
\StringTok{     \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{     [AB39A$1{-}AB39X$1] (21{-}30);}
\StringTok{     \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{     [AB39A$1{-}AB39X$1] (31{-}40);}
\StringTok{     }
\StringTok{     MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{     \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{     [GA32A$1{-}GA33L$1] (1{-}10);}
\StringTok{     \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{     [GA32A$1{-}GA33L$1] (11{-}20);}
\StringTok{     \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{     [GA32A$1{-}GA33L$1] (21{-}30);}
\StringTok{     \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{     [GA32A$1{-}GA33L$1] (31{-}40);}
\StringTok{     }
\StringTok{     MODEL c3:}
\StringTok{     \%c3\#1\%}
\StringTok{     [KA46A$1{-}KA47L$1] (1{-}10);}
\StringTok{     \%c3\#2\%}
\StringTok{     [KA46A$1{-}KA47L$1] (11{-}20);}
\StringTok{     \%c3\#3\%}
\StringTok{     [KA46A$1{-}KA47L$1] (21{-}30);}
\StringTok{     \%c3\#4\%}
\StringTok{     [KA46A$1{-}KA47L$1] (31{-}40);"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  
  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"svalues; sampstat; tech11; tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
    \AttributeTok{SAVEDATA =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{    file = lta\_4class\_cprobs.dat;}
\StringTok{    save = cprobabilities;}
\StringTok{    missflag = 9999;"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{PLOT =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{    type = plot3;}
\StringTok{    series = AB39A AB39H AB39I AB39K AB39L AB39M AB39T AB39U AB39W AB39X}
\StringTok{             GA32A GA32H GA32I GA32K GA32L GA33A GA33H GA33I GA33K GA33L}
\StringTok{             KA46A KA46H KA46I KA46K KA46L KA47A KA47H KA47I KA47K KA47L (*);"}\NormalTok{,}
  
  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ lsay\_data}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Run LTA model}
\NormalTok{lta\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  lta\_model,}
  \AttributeTok{dataout =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lsay\_lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{modelout =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lta\_4class.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{check =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Plot Invariant Probability Plot}\label{plot-invariant-probability-plot}

After fitting the invariant LTA model, we examine the conditional response probabilities for each latent class. These plots illustrate how students in each profile tend to respond to the attitudinal items, averaged across timepoints. Because the model assumes measurement invariance, differences between classes can be interpreted consistently across Grades 7, 10, and 12.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Load LTA model}
\NormalTok{lta\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lta\_4class.out"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{quiet =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Define G7 items}
\NormalTok{g7\_items }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"AB39A"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39H"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39I"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39K"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39L"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39M"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39T"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39U"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39W"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"AB39X"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Define descriptive item labels (from Table 1 in the paper)}
\NormalTok{item\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"I enjoy math"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Math is useful in everyday problems"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Math helps a person think logically"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"It is important to know math to get a good job"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"I will use math in many ways as an adult"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"I enjoy science"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Science is useful in everyday problems"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Science helps a person think logically"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"It is important to know science to get a good job"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"I will use science in many ways as an adult"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Define class names from the paper}
\NormalTok{class\_names }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Inline plot\_lta function (with updated title to match Figure 1)}
\NormalTok{plot\_lta }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(model\_name, }\AttributeTok{time\_point =} \StringTok{"c1"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{items =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  probs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(model\_name}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{parameters}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{probability.scale)}
  
\NormalTok{  pp\_plots }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ probs }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{LatentClass =} \FunctionTok{sub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Class "}\NormalTok{, LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}Class "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{toupper}\NormalTok{(time\_point), }\StringTok{"\#"}\NormalTok{), LatentClass)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(category }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(est, LatentClass, param)}
  
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(items)) \{}
\NormalTok{    pp\_plots }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pp\_plots }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
      \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(param }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ items)}
\NormalTok{  \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{    pp\_plots }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pp\_plots }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
      \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(param }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(param)[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{])}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Apply class names from the paper}
\NormalTok{  pp\_plots }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pp\_plots }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{LatentClass =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      LatentClass }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Class C1\#1"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ class\_names[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{],}
\NormalTok{      LatentClass }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Class C1\#2"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ class\_names[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{],}
\NormalTok{      LatentClass }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Class C1\#3"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ class\_names[}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{],}
\NormalTok{      LatentClass }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Class C1\#4"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ class\_names[}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{],}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ LatentClass}
\NormalTok{    ))}
  
\NormalTok{  pp\_plots }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pp\_plots }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ est) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{relocate}\NormalTok{(param, }\AttributeTok{.after =} \FunctionTok{last\_col}\NormalTok{())}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Extract class proportions (using Grade 7 proportions from Table 4)}
\NormalTok{  c\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{cs =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{34}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{33}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{18}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{))}
  
  \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pp\_plots)[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pp\_plots)[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{], }\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" (\{c\_size[1:4,]\}\%)"}\NormalTok{))}
  
\NormalTok{  plot\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pp\_plots }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"param"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{ncol}\NormalTok{(pp\_plots)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{    reshape2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{melt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{id.vars =} \StringTok{"param"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{param =} \FunctionTok{fct\_inorder}\NormalTok{(param))}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Apply descriptive item labels}
  \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(plot\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{param) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ item\_labels}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Create the plot with the exact title from Figure 1}
\NormalTok{  p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ plot\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ param,}
        \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ value,}
        \AttributeTok{shape =}\NormalTok{ variable,}
        \AttributeTok{linetype =}\NormalTok{ variable,}
        \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ variable}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_shape\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{17}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{18}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_linetype\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"solid"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"dotted"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"dotdash"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_grey}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{start =} \FloatTok{0.1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{end =} \FloatTok{0.6}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_x\_discrete}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{labels =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{str\_wrap}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{ylim}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Proportion of seventh graders endorsing each item by attitudinal profile"}\NormalTok{,  }\CommentTok{\# Exact title from Figure 1}
      \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Probability of Endorsement"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Note: The four{-}class structure is invariant across grades 7, 10, and 12, but probabilities and proportions shown are for Grade 7."}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{legend.text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{legend.key.width =} \FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cm"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{legend.title =} \FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"top"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{hjust =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{plot.margin =} \FunctionTok{margin}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{b =} \DecValTok{40}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{plot.caption =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{plot.title =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"serif"}\NormalTok{)  }\CommentTok{\# Ensure title font matches}
\NormalTok{    )}
  
  \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(p)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Generate plot using plot\_lta}
\NormalTok{final\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_lta}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{model\_name =}\NormalTok{ lta\_model,}
  \AttributeTok{time\_point =} \StringTok{"c1"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{items =}\NormalTok{ g7\_items}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Display plot}
\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(final\_plot)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Conduct Step 2 LTA}\label{conduct-step-2-lta}

In Step 2 of the 3-step LTA procedure, we re-estimate the latent class models separately for Grades 7, 10, and 12, this time fixing the item-response thresholds to the logits obtained from the invariant Step 1 model. This ensures that the class measurement remains consistent across time. We also include auxiliary variables to save the modal class assignments for each student at each grade level. These class assignments will be used in Step 3 to estimate covariate and distal outcome effects while accounting for classification uncertainty.

\subsection{Scrape logits for each grade for the invariant LTA}\label{scrape-logits-for-each-grade-for-the-invariant-lta}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{lta\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lta\_4class.out"}\NormalTok{))}


\CommentTok{\# Extract item thresholds (logits) for all items across all latent classes}
\NormalTok{item\_logits\_full }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lta\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{parameters}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{unstandardized }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(paramHeader }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Thresholds"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(param, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{$1"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{class =}\NormalTok{ LatentClass, }\AttributeTok{item =}\NormalTok{ param, }\AttributeTok{logit =}\NormalTok{ est)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Rerun LCA for Grade 7, 10, and 12 with invariant item probabilities}\label{rerun-lca-for-grade-7-10-and-12-with-invariant-item-probabilities}

  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \StringTok{"}

    \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"4{-}Class G12 LCA with Fixed Thresholds from Invariant LTA"}\NormalTok{,}

    \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  categorical = KA46A KA46H KA46I KA46K KA46L KA47A KA47H KA47I KA47K KA47L;}
\StringTok{  usevar = KA46A KA46H KA46I KA46K KA46L KA47A KA47H KA47I KA47K KA47L;}
\StringTok{  auxiliary = AB39A AB39H AB39I AB39K AB39L AB39M AB39T AB39U AB39W AB39X}

\StringTok{              STEM STEMSup ENGINEER MathG8 SciG8 MathG11 SciG11 Female }
\StringTok{              Minority MathG7 MathG10 MathG12 CASENUM;}
\StringTok{  missing = all(9999);}
\StringTok{  classes = c(4);"}\NormalTok{,}

    \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{      estimator = mlr;}
\StringTok{      type = mixture;}
\StringTok{      starts = 0;}

\subsection{Prepare data for Step 2 LTA}\label{prepare-data-for-step-2-lta}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Helper: extract variable names from a .out file}
\NormalTok{scrape\_saved\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(out\_path) \{}
\NormalTok{  lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readLines}\NormalTok{(out\_path)}
\NormalTok{  start }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{grep}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}SAVEDATA INFORMATION$"}\NormalTok{, lines)}
\NormalTok{  section }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ lines[start}\SpecialCharTok{:}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(lines)]}
\NormalTok{  var\_start }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{grep}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*Order and format of variables}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*$"}\NormalTok{, section)}
\NormalTok{  var\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ section[(var\_start }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{:}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(section)]}
\NormalTok{  end\_idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*Save file format}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*$"}\NormalTok{, var\_lines))[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(end\_idx)) \{}
\NormalTok{    var\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ var\_lines[}\DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\NormalTok{(end\_idx }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)]}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  var\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ var\_lines[}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*[A{-}Za{-}z0{-}9\_]+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+F10}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.3}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*$"}\NormalTok{, var\_lines)]}
  \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+F10}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.3}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*$"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, var\_lines))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Paths}
\NormalTok{g7\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g7.dat"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{g10\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g10.dat"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{g12\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g12.dat"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Output files}
\NormalTok{g7\_out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lca\_g7.out"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{g10\_out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lca\_g10.out"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{g12\_out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lca\_g12.out"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Scrape column names}
\NormalTok{g7\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{scrape\_saved\_vars}\NormalTok{(g7\_out)}
\NormalTok{g10\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{scrape\_saved\_vars}\NormalTok{(g10\_out)}
\NormalTok{g12\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{scrape\_saved\_vars}\NormalTok{(g12\_out)}

\CommentTok{\# Read and rename C column}
\NormalTok{g7 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read.table}\NormalTok{(g7\_path, }\AttributeTok{col.names =}\NormalTok{ g7\_vars)}
\NormalTok{g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read.table}\NormalTok{(g10\_path, }\AttributeTok{col.names =}\NormalTok{ g10\_vars)}
\NormalTok{g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read.table}\NormalTok{(g12\_path, }\AttributeTok{col.names =}\NormalTok{ g12\_vars)}

\CommentTok{\# Rename C columns}
\NormalTok{g7 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g7 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{N1 =}\NormalTok{ C)}
\NormalTok{g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g10 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{N2 =}\NormalTok{ C)}
\NormalTok{g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g12 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{N3 =}\NormalTok{ C)}

\CommentTok{\# Write to CSV for inspection}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(g7, }\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g7\_named.csv"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(g10, }\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g10\_named.csv"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(g12, }\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g12\_named.csv"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Merge Files}\label{merge-files}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Load base file}
\NormalTok{g7 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g7\_named.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{col\_types =} \FunctionTok{cols}\NormalTok{())}

\CommentTok{\# Only grab CASENUM + N2 / N3 from others}
\NormalTok{g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g10\_named.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{col\_types =} \FunctionTok{cols}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(CASENUM, N2)}
\NormalTok{g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_csv}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"g12\_named.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{col\_types =} \FunctionTok{cols}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(CASENUM, N3)}
\CommentTok{\# After loading all three CSVs:}
\NormalTok{g7 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g7 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(.x, }\DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{g10 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g10 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(.x, }\DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{g12 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g12 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(.x, }\DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{)))}

\CommentTok{\# Merge cleanly by CASENUM}
\NormalTok{merged }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ g7 }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(g10, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"CASENUM"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(g12, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"CASENUM"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{N1 =} \FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(N1, }\DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{N2 =} \FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(N2, }\DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{N3 =} \FunctionTok{replace\_na}\NormalTok{(N3, }\DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Write final output}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv}\NormalTok{(merged, }\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"merged.csv"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Scrape Logits for LTA}\label{scrape-logits-for-lta}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{g7\_model  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lca\_g7.out"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{g10\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lca\_g10.out"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{g12\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lca\_enum2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lca\_g12.out"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Extract Logits}\label{extract-logits}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Model list using correct source: class\_counts$logitProbs.mostLikely}
\NormalTok{model\_list }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{G7  =}\NormalTok{ g7\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logitProbs.mostLikely,}
  \AttributeTok{G10 =}\NormalTok{ g10\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logitProbs.mostLikely,}
  \AttributeTok{G12 =}\NormalTok{ g12\_model}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{class\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logitProbs.mostLikely}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Reshape each 4x4 matrix into tidy long format}
\NormalTok{step2\_logits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{map2\_dfr}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  model\_list,}
  \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(model\_list),}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(mat, grade) \{}
    \CommentTok{\# Assign column names explicitly}
    \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(mat) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"V"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{ncol}\NormalTok{(mat)))}

    \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(mat) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
      \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{source\_class =} \FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{()) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
      \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{cols =} \FunctionTok{starts\_with}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"V"}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"assigned\_class"}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{names\_prefix =} \StringTok{"V"}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"logit"}
\NormalTok{      ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
      \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{assigned\_class =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(assigned\_class),}
        \AttributeTok{grade =}\NormalTok{ grade}
\NormalTok{      ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
      \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(grade, source\_class, assigned\_class, logit)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\subsection{Conduct Step 2 LTA with fixed classes}\label{conduct-step-2-lta-with-fixed-classes}

After rerunning the grade-specific LCAs with fixed logits, we merge the saved modal class assignment files into a single dataset. This merged file includes class membership at each grade along with relevant auxiliary variables. Using this file, we then run the Step 2 LTA model by fixing the class assignment logits (classification probabilities) from the grade-specific models. This step allows us to model transitions across latent profiles over time while incorporating the uncertainty in class membership derived from the classification error rates.

As a quality check, we cross-reference the estimated class sizes from Step 2 against those from the invariant Step 1 model. Matching class sizes confirms that the Step 2 specification correctly replicates the measurement structure and preserves consistency in profile estimation.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Extract logits for each timepoint into matrices}
\NormalTok{logits\_n1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(step2\_logits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logit[step2\_logits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grade }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"G7"}\NormalTok{],  }\AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{byrow =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{logits\_n2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(step2\_logits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logit[step2\_logits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grade }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"G10"}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{byrow =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{logits\_n3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{matrix}\NormalTok{(step2\_logits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{logit[step2\_logits}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grade }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"G12"}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{byrow =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Build Mplus object}
\NormalTok{step2\_lta\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step 2 LTA with Fixed Logits — No Covariates"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  USEVAR = n1 n2 n3;}
\StringTok{  NOMINAL = n1 n2 n3;}
\StringTok{  MISSING = all(9999);}
\StringTok{  CLASSES = c1(4) c2(4) c3(4);"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  TYPE = mixture;}
\StringTok{  STARTS = 0;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  MODEL c1:}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[4,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[4,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  MODEL c3:}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[4,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  "}\NormalTok{),}

  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"svalues; tech11; tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ merged}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Run model}
\NormalTok{step2\_lta\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  step2\_lta\_model,}
  \AttributeTok{modelout =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"step2\_lta.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{dataout  =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"step2\_lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{check =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Run Step 3 LTA with Covariates}\label{run-step-3-lta-with-covariates}

In Step 3, we estimate the full LTA model with covariates using the merged dataset from Step 2. This step regresses latent class membership and class transitions on external variables (e.g., gender, race/ethnicity, or prior achievement) to examine how background characteristics predict profile membership and change over time. Because classification error was accounted for in Step 2, the resulting covariate estimates are unbiased and reflect the true relationships between predictors and latent trajectories.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Build Mplus object}
\NormalTok{step3\_lta\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusObject}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{TITLE =} \StringTok{"Step 3 LTA with Fixed Logits and Covariates"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{VARIABLE =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  USEVAR = n1 n2 n3 Female Minority MathG7 MathG10 MathG12;}
\StringTok{  NOMINAL = n1 n2 n3;}
\StringTok{  MISSING = all(9999);}
\StringTok{  CLASSES = c1(4) c2(4) c3(4);"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{ANALYSIS =} \StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  TYPE = mixture;}
\StringTok{  STARTS = 0;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{MODEL =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}
\StringTok{  \%OVERALL\%}
\StringTok{  c1 ON Minority Female (c11f c12f c13f) MathG7;}
\StringTok{  c2 ON c1 Minority Female MathG10;}
\StringTok{  c3 ON c2 Minority Female MathG12;}
\StringTok{  }
\StringTok{  MODEL c1:}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c1\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [n1\#1@\{logits\_n1[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#2@\{logits\_n1[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n1\#3@\{logits\_n1[4,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  MODEL c2:}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c2\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [n2\#1@\{logits\_n2[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#2@\{logits\_n2[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n2\#3@\{logits\_n2[4,3]\}];}

\StringTok{  MODEL c3:}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#1\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[1,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[1,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[1,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#2\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[2,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[2,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[2,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#3\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[3,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[3,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[3,3]\}];}
\StringTok{    \%c3\#4\%}
\StringTok{      [n3\#1@\{logits\_n3[4,1]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#2@\{logits\_n3[4,2]\}];}
\StringTok{      [n3\#3@\{logits\_n3[4,3]\}];}
\StringTok{  "}\NormalTok{),}

  \AttributeTok{OUTPUT =} \StringTok{"svalues; tech11; tech14;"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{rdata =}\NormalTok{ merged}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Run model}
\NormalTok{step3\_lta\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mplusModeler}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  step3\_lta\_model,}
  \AttributeTok{modelout =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"step3\_lta.inp"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{dataout  =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"step3\_lta.dat"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{check =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{run =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{hashfilename =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Create Transition Probability Plots}\label{create-transition-probability-plots}

To explore how students' attitudinal profiles evolve over time, we generated transition probability plots using Sankey diagrams. We began with the full sample, then created subgroup-specific plots to highlight potential differences by gender and racial/ethnic identity. Specifically, we examined transitions for female students, male students, female students from minoritized backgrounds, and female students who are not part of a racial/ethnic minority. These visualizations help illustrate which profiles are most stable and where notable shifts occur across grades.

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

Re order classes

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\NormalTok{merged }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \CommentTok{\# Recode N1 (Grade 7)}
    \AttributeTok{N1\_label =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      N1 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N1 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{4} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N1 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{3} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N1 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \CommentTok{\# Recode N2 (Grade 10)}
    \AttributeTok{N2\_label =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      N2 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N2 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{4} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N2 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{3} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N2 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \CommentTok{\# Recode N3 (Grade 12)}
    \AttributeTok{N3\_label =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      N3 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N3 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{4} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N3 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{3} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      N3 }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Factorize with correct top{-}down plotting order}
    \AttributeTok{N1\_label =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N1\_label, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{    )),}
    \AttributeTok{N2\_label =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N2\_label, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{    )),}
    \AttributeTok{N3\_label =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N3\_label, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{    ))}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Examine Transition Probability Plot for the Full Sample}\label{examine-transition-probability-plot-for-the-full-sample}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\DocumentationTok{\#\#\#\# 1. Reload transition function and read model \#\#\#\#}
\FunctionTok{source}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"functions"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"plot\_transitions\_function.R"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{step3\_full }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readModels}\NormalTok{(here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"lta\_enum"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"step3\_lta.out"}\NormalTok{))}

\DocumentationTok{\#\#\#\# 2. Define color palette (new correct labels) \#\#\#\#}
\NormalTok{class\_colors }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Very Positive"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#BA68C8"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}  \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#00BCD4"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Neutral"}             \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#8BC34A"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Less Positive"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\#E74C3C"}
\NormalTok{)}

\DocumentationTok{\#\#\#\# 3. Set correct class names per quadrant (TL → TR → BL → BR) \#\#\#\#}
\NormalTok{plot\_full }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_transitions\_function}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{model\_name       =}\NormalTok{ step3\_full,}
  \AttributeTok{color\_palette    =}\NormalTok{ class\_colors,}
  \AttributeTok{facet\_labels     =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{1}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Very Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{2}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Qualified Positive"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{3}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Neutral"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{4}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Less Positive"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{timepoint\_labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{1}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Grade 7"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{2}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Grade 10"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{3}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Grade 12"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{class\_labels     =} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(class\_colors)}
\NormalTok{)}

\DocumentationTok{\#\#\#\# 4. Add single plot title and theme settings \#\#\#\#}
\NormalTok{plot\_full }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ plot\_full }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{ggtitle}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Attitudinal Profile Transitions: Grade 7 to 10 and Grade 10 to 12"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{strip.text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"Arial"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{11}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{face =} \StringTok{"plain"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{plot.title =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"Arial"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{hjust =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{14}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{margin =} \FunctionTok{margin}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{b =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{text =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{family =} \StringTok{"Arial"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\DocumentationTok{\#\#\#\# 5. Render plot \#\#\#\#}
\NormalTok{plot\_full}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
