\subsection{Examine table of covariate results for the Step 3 LTA}\label{examine-table-of-covariate-results-for-the-step-3-lta}

We next examine the covariate results from the Step 3 LTA, which model how student characteristics predict both profile membership and transitions between profiles over time. The table reports logit estimates, standard errors, and odds ratios with confidence intervals for each covariate effect. These results allow us to identify which background factors are significantly associated with students' starting profile in Grade 7, and how those factors relate to their likelihood of transitioning to different profiles across timepoints.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Define class labels}
\NormalTok{class\_names }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"1"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Low Belonging"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"2"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Moderate Belonging"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"3"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"High Support"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"4"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Engaged \& Connected"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Build covariate comparison data}
\NormalTok{covariate\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ step3\_full}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{parameters}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{unstandardized }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\StringTok{"\^{}C[1{-}3]\#}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.ON$"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{    param }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MINORITY"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"MATHG7"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"MATHG10"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"MATHG12"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{LatentClass =} \FunctionTok{str\_extract}\NormalTok{(paramHeader, }\StringTok{"C[1{-}3]\#}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ClassNum =} \FunctionTok{str\_extract}\NormalTok{(LatentClass, }\StringTok{"\#}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{str\_remove}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\#"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ClassName =}\NormalTok{ class\_names[ClassNum],}
    \AttributeTok{RefName =}\NormalTok{ class\_names[}\StringTok{"4"}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{Comparison =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\{ClassName\} vs. \{RefName\}"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{Timepoint =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(LatentClass, }\StringTok{"C1"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Grade 7"}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(LatentClass, }\StringTok{"C2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Grade 10"}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{str\_detect}\NormalTok{(LatentClass, }\StringTok{"C3"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Grade 12"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{Timepoint =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(Timepoint, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Grade 7"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Grade 10"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Grade 12"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{OR =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(est),}
    \AttributeTok{OR\_lower =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(est }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FloatTok{1.96} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ se),}
    \AttributeTok{OR\_upper =} \FunctionTok{exp}\NormalTok{(est }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FloatTok{1.96} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ se),}
    \AttributeTok{OR\_CI =} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.2f [\%.2f, \%.2f]"}\NormalTok{, OR, OR\_lower, OR\_upper),}
    \AttributeTok{Logit =} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.2f"}\NormalTok{, est),}
    \AttributeTok{SE =} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.2f"}\NormalTok{, se),}
    \AttributeTok{pval\_fmt =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textless{}.001"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.3f"}\NormalTok{, pval)),}
    \AttributeTok{pval\_num =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(pval }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ .}\DecValTok{001}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.0009}\NormalTok{, pval)  }\CommentTok{\# for styling logic}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(Timepoint, ClassNum) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{RowGroup =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\{Timepoint\}: \{Comparison\}"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(RowGroup, }\AttributeTok{Covariate =}\NormalTok{ param, Logit, SE, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Odds Ratio [95\% CI]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ OR\_CI, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ pval\_fmt, pval\_num)}

\CommentTok{\# Build gt table}
\NormalTok{covariate\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ covariate\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{pval\_num) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{groupname\_col =} \StringTok{"RowGroup"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Step 3 LTA Covariate Effects"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Log Odds of Class Membership Relative to Engaged \& Connected"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Covariate =} \StringTok{"Covariate"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{Logit =} \StringTok{"Logit"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{SE =} \StringTok{"SE"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Odds Ratio [95\% CI]}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Odds Ratio [95\% CI]"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"p{-}value"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{style =} \StringTok{"italic"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_row\_groups}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{vars}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ covariate\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pval\_num }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.05}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}


\NormalTok{covariate\_table}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{gtsave}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ covariate\_table,}
  \AttributeTok{filename =} \FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"tc\_lta"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"figures"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"step3\_covariate\_table.png"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}

\section{Examine Outcome Variables}\label{examine-outcome-variables}

In a modern three-step LTA workflow, distal outcomes such as achievement are typically incorporated directly into the third step using model constraints. However, in line with the original paper, we replicate their approach by examining achievement outcomes post hoc using ANOVAs. Specifically, we test whether 12th-grade mathematics and science achievement differ by students' final attitudinal profile. This allows us to assess the external validity of the profiles by linking them to meaningful academic indicators.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 1. Prepare variables}
\NormalTok{merged }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{traj\_final =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N3, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{stable\_profile =}\NormalTok{ (N1 }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ N2 }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ N2 }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ N3)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# 2. Group means and SDs, exclude 9999 and NA in traj\_final}
\NormalTok{distal\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    MATHG11 }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{    SCIG11 }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(traj\_final)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(traj\_final) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{n =} \FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{math\_mean =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(MATHG11),}
    \AttributeTok{math\_sd   =} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(MATHG11),}
    \AttributeTok{sci\_mean  =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(SCIG11),}
    \AttributeTok{sci\_sd    =} \FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(SCIG11),}
    \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# 3. Run ANOVAs (excluding 9999)}
\NormalTok{aov\_math }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{aov}\NormalTok{(MATHG11 }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ traj\_final, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(MATHG11 }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{aov\_sci  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{aov}\NormalTok{(SCIG11  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ traj\_final, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(SCIG11 }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# 4. Extract test stats}
\NormalTok{f\_math }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_math)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{F value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{p\_math }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_math)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Pr(\textgreater{}F)}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{df\_math1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_math)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Df[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{df\_math2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_math)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Df[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{]}

\NormalTok{f\_sci }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_sci)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{F value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{p\_sci }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_sci)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Pr(\textgreater{}F)}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{df\_sci1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_sci)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Df[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{df\_sci2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_sci)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Df[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{]}

\CommentTok{\# 5. Format table}
\FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(distal\_summary) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"12th Grade Achievement by Final Attitudinal Profile"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{ends\_with}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mean"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{ends\_with}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"sd"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \StringTok{"n"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{traj\_final =} \StringTok{"Final Profile"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{n =} \StringTok{"N"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{math\_mean =} \StringTok{"Math M"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{math\_sd   =} \StringTok{"Math SD"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{sci\_mean  =} \StringTok{"Science M"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{sci\_sd    =} \StringTok{"Science SD"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_source\_note}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{source\_note =}\NormalTok{ glue}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"ANOVA — Math: F(\{df\_math1\}, \{df\_math2\}) = \{round(f\_math, 2)\}, p = \{format.pval(p\_math, digits = 3)\}; "}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Science: F(\{df\_sci1\}, \{df\_sci2\}) = \{round(f\_sci, 2)\}, p = \{format.pval(p\_sci, digits = 3)\}"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large 12th Grade Achievement by Final Attitudinal Profile}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}crrrrr}
\toprule
Final Profile & N & Math M & Math SD & Science M & Science SD \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]

\end{tabular*}
\begin{minipage}{\linewidth}
ANOVA — Math: F(3, 811) = 22.53, p = 5.12e-14; Science: F(3, 815) = 19.82, p = 2.08e-12\\
\end{minipage}
\end{table}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 1. Class label mapping}
\NormalTok{profile\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"1"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Supportive"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"2"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Disconnected"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"3"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Moderate"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"4"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Negative"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# 2. Clean and label profiles}
\NormalTok{df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(MATHG11 }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{, SCIG11 }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{9999}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{profile =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N3, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# 3. ANOVA + Tukey — Math}
\NormalTok{aov\_math }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{aov}\NormalTok{(MATHG11 }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ profile, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ df)}
\NormalTok{tukey\_math }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{TukeyHSD}\NormalTok{(aov\_math)}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{profile}
\NormalTok{tukey\_math\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(tukey\_math) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{rownames\_to\_column}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Comparison"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Outcome =} \StringTok{"Math"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{Group1 =} \FunctionTok{str\_match}\NormalTok{(Comparison, }\StringTok{"\^{}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+){-}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+)$"}\NormalTok{)[,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{Group2 =} \FunctionTok{str\_match}\NormalTok{(Comparison, }\StringTok{"\^{}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+){-}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+)$"}\NormalTok{)[,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{Comparison =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\{profile\_labels[Group2]\} vs. \{profile\_labels[Group1]\}"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(Outcome, Comparison, diff, lwr, upr, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p adj}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Mean Difference}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ diff,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Lower CI}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}        \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ lwr,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Upper CI}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}        \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ upr,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Adjusted p}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}      \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p adj}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# 4. ANOVA + Tukey — Science}
\NormalTok{aov\_sci }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{aov}\NormalTok{(SCIG11 }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ profile, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ df)}
\NormalTok{tukey\_sci }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{TukeyHSD}\NormalTok{(aov\_sci)}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{profile}
\NormalTok{tukey\_sci\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(tukey\_sci) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{rownames\_to\_column}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Comparison"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Outcome =} \StringTok{"Science"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{Group1 =} \FunctionTok{str\_match}\NormalTok{(Comparison, }\StringTok{"\^{}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+){-}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+)$"}\NormalTok{)[,}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{Group2 =} \FunctionTok{str\_match}\NormalTok{(Comparison, }\StringTok{"\^{}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+){-}(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{d+)$"}\NormalTok{)[,}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{],}
    \AttributeTok{Comparison =} \FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\{profile\_labels[Group2]\} vs. \{profile\_labels[Group1]\}"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(Outcome, Comparison, diff, lwr, upr, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p adj}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Mean Difference}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ diff,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Lower CI}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}        \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ lwr,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Upper CI}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}        \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ upr,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Adjusted p}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}      \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p adj}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# 5. F values}
\NormalTok{math\_f }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_math)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{sci\_f  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{summary}\NormalTok{(aov\_sci)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}

\CommentTok{\# 6. Build Math table}
\NormalTok{gt\_math\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(tukey\_math\_df) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Pairwise Comparisons for 12th Grade Math Achievement"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Mean Difference"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Lower CI"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Upper CI"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{text\_transform}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \StringTok{"Adjusted p"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{fn =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textless{}.001"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{formatC}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x), }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"f"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \StringTok{"Adjusted p"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{rows =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Adjusted p}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_source\_note}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{source\_note =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"*F*(\{math\_f$Df[1]\}, \{math\_f$Df[2]\}) = \{round(math\_f$\textasciigrave{}F value\textasciigrave{}[1], 2)\}, *p* = \{format.pval(math\_f$\textasciigrave{}Pr(\textgreater{}F)\textasciigrave{}[1], digits = 3, eps = .001)\}"}
\NormalTok{  )))}

\CommentTok{\# 7. Build Science table}
\NormalTok{gt\_sci\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(tukey\_sci\_df) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Pairwise Comparisons for 12th Grade Science Achievement"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Mean Difference"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Lower CI"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Upper CI"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{text\_transform}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \StringTok{"Adjusted p"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{fn =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textless{}.001"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{formatC}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x), }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"f"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \StringTok{"Adjusted p"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{rows =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Adjusted p}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_source\_note}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{source\_note =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{glue}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"*F*(\{sci\_f$Df[1]\}, \{sci\_f$Df[2]\}) = \{round(sci\_f$\textasciigrave{}F value\textasciigrave{}[1], 2)\}, *p* = \{format.pval(sci\_f$\textasciigrave{}Pr(\textgreater{}F)\textasciigrave{}[1], digits = 3, eps = .001)\}"}
\NormalTok{  )))}

\CommentTok{\# 8. Render both tables}
\NormalTok{gt\_math\_table}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Gender Differences in Transition Probabilities}\label{gender-differences-in-transition-probabilities}

To test for gender differences in attitudinal profile transitions, we computed pairwise z-tests comparing the proportion of female and male students transitioning between each pair of latent classes from Grade 7 to Grade 10. The table below presents cell counts, transition percentages by gender, and two-tailed z-tests for equality of proportions. Statistically significant differences (p \textless{} .05) are bolded to highlight transitions where gender-based patterns emerge

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]

\CommentTok{\# Step 1: Drop invalids and label properly}
\NormalTok{gender\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ merged }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(N1 }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, N2 }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{, FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \DecValTok{0}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{N1 =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N1, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{N2 =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(N2, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \DecValTok{1}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{FEMALE =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(FEMALE, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \DecValTok{0}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MALE"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"FEMALE"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Step 2: Count transitions}
\NormalTok{gender\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gender\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{count}\NormalTok{(N1, N2, FEMALE) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ FEMALE,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ n,}
    \AttributeTok{values\_fill =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n\_FEMALE =}\NormalTok{ FEMALE, }\AttributeTok{n\_MALE =}\NormalTok{ MALE) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{p\_FEMALE =}\NormalTok{ n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE),}
    \AttributeTok{p\_MALE   =}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Step 3: z{-}tests}
\NormalTok{gender\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gender\_counts }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{p1 =}\NormalTok{ n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE),}
    \AttributeTok{p2 =}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE),}
    \AttributeTok{n1 =}\NormalTok{ n\_FEMALE }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ n\_MALE,}
    \AttributeTok{se =} \FunctionTok{sqrt}\NormalTok{((p1 }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p1) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ n1) }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ (p2 }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p2) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ n1)),}
    \AttributeTok{z =}\NormalTok{ (p1 }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p2) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ se,}
    \AttributeTok{p\_val\_raw =} \DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}} \FunctionTok{pnorm}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(z)))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Step 4: Recode class names directly as factors for clean display}
\NormalTok{gender\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gender\_counts }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{N1 =} \FunctionTok{fct\_recode}\NormalTok{(N1,}
      \StringTok{"Disengaged"}     \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Moderate"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"2"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Positive"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"3"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Very Positive"}  \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"4"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{N2 =} \FunctionTok{fct\_recode}\NormalTok{(N2,}
      \StringTok{"Disengaged"}     \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Moderate"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"2"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Positive"}       \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"3"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Very Positive"}  \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"4"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Step 5: Final display formatting}
\NormalTok{gender\_transition\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gender\_counts }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Female \%}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(p1 }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Male \%}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}   \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(p2 }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}  \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(p\_val\_raw }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.001}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\textless{}.001"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{sub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}0"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.3f"}\NormalTok{, p\_val\_raw)))}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{From}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ N1, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{To}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ N2,}
\NormalTok{    n\_FEMALE, n\_MALE,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Female \%}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Male \%}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{    z, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, p\_val\_raw}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Step 6: Create gt table with italicized labels and bold significant p{-}values}
\NormalTok{gt\_gender\_ztests }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gender\_transition\_table }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Z{-}Tests for Gender Differences in Transition Probabilities"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{fmt\_number}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"z"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{decimals =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{n\_FEMALE =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*n* (Female)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{n\_MALE   =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*n* (Male)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{z        =} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*z*"}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{md}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"*p*{-}value"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{opt\_row\_striping}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{tab\_style}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{style =} \FunctionTok{cell\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{weight =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{locations =} \FunctionTok{cells\_body}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{columns =} \FunctionTok{vars}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{p{-}value}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{rows =}\NormalTok{ p\_val\_raw }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.05}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{cols\_hide}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ p\_val\_raw)}

\CommentTok{\# View table}
\NormalTok{gt\_gender\_ztests}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{table}[t]
\caption*{
{\large Z-Tests for Gender Differences in Transition Probabilities}
} 
\fontsize{12.0pt}{14.4pt}\selectfont
\begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{@{\extracolsep{\fill}}ccrrrrrl}
\toprule
From & To & \emph{n} (Female) & \emph{n} (Male) & Female \% & Male \% & \emph{z} & \emph{p}-value \\ 
\midrule\addlinespace[2.5pt]
Disengaged & Disengaged & 115 & 134 & 46.2 & 53.8 & -1.71 & .088 \\ 
Disengaged & Moderate & 22 & 39 & 36.1 & 63.9 & -3.21 & {\bfseries .001} \\

Positive & Disengaged & 36 & 46 & 43.9 & 56.1 & -1.57 & .116 \\
